Precision Thrust.name: Precision Thrust
Precision Thrust.description: Execute a swift, precise thrust to strike weak points and bypass armor.

Whirling Defense.name: Whirling Defense
Whirling Defense.description: Spin your spear rapidly to deflect projectiles and light attacks while damaging nearby enemies.

Javelin Dash.name: Javelin Dash
Javelin Dash.description: Charge forward with your spear, covering significant distance to close gaps or deliver a powerful piercing attack.

First Aid.name: First Aid
First Aid.description: Quickly treat minor injuries and stabilize serious wounds.

Herbal Remedies.name: Herbal Remedies
Herbal Remedies.description: Craft potent medicinal concoctions from natural ingredients to heal wounds, cure poison, and provide resistance to sickness.

Surgical Precision.name: Surgical Precision
Surgical Precision.description: Perform intricate medical procedures to treat severe injuries and remove deeply embedded foreign objects or toxins.

Agile Leap.name: Agile Leap
Agile Leap.description: Execute a precise jump with increased height and distance to reach elevated positions or cross gaps.

Aerial Evasion.name: Aerial Evasion
Aerial Evasion.description: Flip with extraordinary grace, effortlessly evading attacks and obstacles.

Swift Strike.name: Swift Strike
Swift Strike.description: Execute a lightning-fast stab that catches enemies off-guard.

Fatal Embrace.name: Fatal Embrace
Fatal Embrace.description: Go in for a hug or handshake and smoothly stab your target without anyone knowing.

Shadow Step.name: Shadow Step
Shadow Step.description: Teleport from one shadow to another nearby, vanishing and reappearing.

Thousand Cuts.name: Thousand Cuts
Thousand Cuts.description: Unleash a flurry of rapid dagger strikes, overwhelming opponents with a barrage of attacks.

Swift Jab.name: Swift Jab
Swift Jab.description: Execute a quick, precise strike that can catch opponents off-guard.

Resilience.name: Resilience
Resilience.description: No matter how many times an enemy throws you away, keep coming back and challenging them until the job is done.

Gentle Touch.name: Gentle Touch
Gentle Touch.description: Calm and reassure animals with a soothing touch.

Pack Alpha.name: Pack Alpha
Pack Alpha.description: Establish yourself as a leader among animals, gaining their loyalty and commanding small groups.

Fire Binding.name: Fire Binding
Fire Binding.description: Channel raw elemental fire with precise control, shaping flames to your exact specifications.

Burst of Speed.name: Burst of Speed
Burst of Speed.description: Move so fast you seem to blur, crossing distance in an instant.

Keen Senses.name: Keen Senses
Keen Senses.description: Sharpen your senses to detect subtle signs of animal presence.

Silent Approach.name: Silent Approach
Silent Approach.description: Move with exceptional stealth while hunting, greatly reducing the chance of alerting prey.

Prey Instinct.name: Prey Instinct
Prey Instinct.description: Develop an intuitive understanding of animal behavior to predict movements and locate prey effectively.

Rushing Rapids.name: Rushing Rapids
Rushing Rapids.description: Manipulate nearby water sources, whipping them into a torrent that can sweep enemies off their feet.

Mist Veil.name: Mist Veil
Mist Veil.description: Create dense fog in the surrounding area, obscuring vision and providing cover.

Ice Prison.name: Ice Prison
Ice Prison.description: Turn nearby water or mist into ice spikes ready to impale enemies.

Stone Slam.name: Stone Slam
Stone Slam.description: Conjure and launch a dense stone projectile at a target.

Earthen Tomb.name: Earthen Tomb
Earthen Tomb.description: Lift earthen walls around the target to prevent escape, then slam the walls together to bury them alive.

Wind Step.name: Wind Step
Wind Step.description: Harness the power of air to make quick dashes or brief periods of flight.

Medium Flight.name: Medium Flight
Medium Flight.description: Surround yourself or an ally with a swirling vortex of wind to fly across a large open area.

Solar Orb.name: Solar Orb
Solar Orb.description: Create a small sphere of light that can heal and guide the pure of heart, or blind and burn the wicked.

Radiant Beam.name: Radiant Beam
Radiant Beam.description: Channel a focused beam of light energy to damage enemies or heal the innocent.

Rebirth.name: Rebirth
Rebirth.description: Envelop yourself or an ally in a protective barrier of healing light energy.

Verdant Growth.name: Verdant Growth
Verdant Growth.description: Accelerate the growth of nearby plants, creating small barriers or sources of food.

Animal Kinship.name: Animal Kinship
Animal Kinship.description: Establish a temporary bond with nearby animals, allowing you to communicate basic ideas and request assistance.

Nature's Remedy.name: Nature's Remedy
Nature's Remedy.description: Channel the healing energies of nature to cure wounds, neutralize poisons, and remove curses.

Primal Fury.name: Primal Fury
Primal Fury.description: Embrace the raw beast spirit within, letting wounds and pain fuel your savage attacks.

Blood Lash.name: Blood Lash
Blood Lash.description: Lash an enemy with a magical whip made of your own blood, causing them to bleed profusely.

Blood Vision.name: Blood Vision
Blood Vision.description: See the heat signatures and life energy of nearby beings, even through walls or beneath the earth.

Drain Life.name: Drain Life
Drain Life.description: Drain life force from nearby enemies with open wounds, dealing damage and restoring your own health.

Emotional Manipulation.name: Emotional Manipulation
Emotional Manipulation.description: Cast spells that influence the emotions of others, causing fear, calm, or frenzy.

Phantasmal Duplicate.name: Phantasmal Duplicate
Phantasmal Duplicate.description: Create a convincing illusory copy of yourself or others that can act independently.

Summon Familiar.name: Summon Familiar
Summon Familiar.description: Call a small magical creature to serve as your assistant and companion.

Bound Armory.name: Bound Armory
Bound Armory.description: Conjure magical weapons and armor from the Immortal Armory that are more powerful than their physical counterparts.

Portal.name: Portal
Portal.description: Open a portal to a distant place to travel across the world or summon an ally from another dimension.

Soothing Melody.name: Soothing Melody
Soothing Melody.description: Play a calming tune that reduces stress and minor pain for listeners.

Inspiring Anthem.name: Inspiring Anthem
Inspiring Anthem.description: Perform a rousing piece that boosts the morale and energy of allies.

Raise Commander.name: Raise Commander
Raise Commander.description: Raise a powerful corpse capable of commanding and strengthening other minions.

Animate Dead.name: Animate Dead
Animate Dead.description: Raise and control a small number of undead minions to fight for you or perform simple tasks.

Minor Stitch.name: Minor Stitch
Minor Stitch.description: Repair any damage to your undead servants, patching them back up for fighting.

Pulling the Strings.name: Pulling the Strings
Pulling the Strings.description: Coordinate the movement of all your undead minions, controlling them and giving them instructions for years on end.

True Sight.name: True Sight
True Sight.description: See the true source behind a phenomenon, such as who commands an enemy force or where a distant caster is.

Aura Reading.name: Aura Reading
Aura Reading.description: Perceive the auras of living beings and magical items, revealing their emotional state, intentions, or magical properties.

Scrying Eye.name: Scrying Eye
Scrying Eye.description: Project your consciousness to a distant location to see and hear events happening far away.

Cleansing Circle.name: Cleansing Circle
Cleansing Circle.description: Perform a simple ritual to clear the area of harmful magic and prevent distant sources from penetrating inside.

Circle of Protection.name: Circle of Protection
Circle of Protection.description: Draw a line in the sand. While you stand, evil cannot cross it.

Elemental Invocation.name: Elemental Invocation
Elemental Invocation.description: Perform a ritual to call upon and temporarily control elemental forces.

Healing Touch.name: Healing Touch
Healing Touch.description: Channel restorative energy to heal minor wounds and alleviate pain.

Purifying Aura.name: Purifying Aura
Purifying Aura.description: Create a field of healing energy around you that restores health to allies and cleanses minor curses or poisons.

Life Link.name: Life Link
Life Link.description: Establish a magical connection between two beings to share life force.

Forager's Instinct.name: Forager's Instinct
Forager's Instinct.description: Develop a keen sense for identifying edible plants and safe water sources in the wilderness.

Adaptive Camouflage.name: Adaptive Camouflage
Adaptive Camouflage.description: Quickly create effective camouflage from available materials.

Weather Sense.name: Weather Sense
Weather Sense.description: Gain an intuitive understanding of weather patterns to predict dangerous conditions and find natural shelter.

Mounted Agility.name: Mounted Agility
Mounted Agility.description: Enhance your ability to maneuver quickly and precisely while on horseback.

Cavalry Charge.name: Cavalry Charge
Cavalry Charge.description: Master the art of mounted combat, significantly increasing your damage and impact when attacking from horseback.

Friendly Face.name: Friendly Face
Friendly Face.description: Project an aura of approachability and trustworthiness.

Silver Tongue.name: Silver Tongue
Silver Tongue.description: Speak with supernatural persuasiveness - your words carry weight beyond their meaning.

Emotional Harmony.name: Emotional Harmony
Emotional Harmony.description: Infuse your performances with deep emotion to strongly affect the mood and feelings of your audience.

Mass Appeal.name: Mass Appeal
Mass Appeal.description: Develop the charisma and oratory skills to influence large groups of people simultaneously.

Imposing Presence.name: Imposing Presence
Imposing Presence.description: Project an aura of subtle menace, making others slightly uneasy in your presence.

Silent Stare.name: Silent Stare
Silent Stare.description: Maintain a poker face, intimidating anyone who tries to influence you.

Imperious Command.name: Imperious Command
Imperious Command.description: Infuse your voice with a ruler's authority, commanding others to obey your will.

Rallying Cry.name: Rallying Cry
Rallying Cry.description: Let out a shout that rallies everyone who hears it, turning the tide of battle.

Rousing Speech.name: Rousing Speech
Rousing Speech.description: Inspire your allies to push themselves to live up to their principles.

Inspiring Presence.name: Inspiring Presence
Inspiring Presence.description: Your courage is contagious. Allies fighting beside you find themselves braver than they knew.

Captivating Presence.name: Captivating Presence
Captivating Presence.description: Draw and hold the attention of small audiences with your charismatic stage presence.

Mesmerizing Spectacle.name: Mesmerizing Spectacle
Mesmerizing Spectacle.description: Create performances so captivating they border on hypnotic, holding your audience in rapt attention.

Silent Step.name: Silent Step
Silent Step.description: Master the art of moving silently, significantly reducing the noise you make while walking or running.

Shadow Meld.name: Shadow Meld
Shadow Meld.description: Gain the ability to blend seamlessly with shadows, becoming nearly invisible in areas of low light.

Steady Aim.name: Steady Aim
Steady Aim.description: Calm your breathing and steady your hand, significantly improving your accuracy with bows.

Heart Strike.name: Heart Strike
Heart Strike.description: Strike directly at the heart with perfect precision - a potentially killing blow.

Ricochet Toss.name: Ricochet Toss
Ricochet Toss.description: Calculate and execute a precise throw that bounces off a surface before hitting its target.

Everything Must Go.name: Everything Must Go
Everything Must Go.description: Grab and throw anything and everything on hand, chucking it as fast as possible to do maximum damage.

Fatal Strike.name: Fatal Strike
Fatal Strike.description: Leap at your target, putting your full weight behind your strike, with no regard for your own wellbeing.

Blood Frenzy.name: Blood Frenzy
Blood Frenzy.description: Enter a relentless state where damage no longer phases you, and you can continue fighting and healing yourself by drawing on your ancestors' energy.

Battle Song.name: Battle Song
Battle Song.description: Perform a mystical chant, boosting the strength of you and your allies as you fight.

Crimson Strike.name: Crimson Strike
Crimson Strike.description: Slash your opponent and turn their pain into your pleasure. Drain life force from their blood to strengthen yourself.

Vital Drain.name: Vital Drain
Vital Drain.description: Reach out toward your enemy, sucking the very life force from within them, and empower yourself.

Hazy Mist.name: Hazy Mist
Hazy Mist.description: Exhale a vapor of blood which clouds the mind of anyone that breathes it, making them weak and slow.

Nature's Wrath.name: Nature's Wrath
Nature's Wrath.description: Channel raw nature energy into a blast of primal force - wind, thorns, lightning, or crushing roots.

Green Growth.name: Green Growth
Green Growth.description: Coax plants to rapid growth - vines reaching, roots spreading, branches bending to your will.

Exploit Environment.name: Exploit Environment
Exploit Environment.description: Assess the battlefield and adapt your fighting style to exploit terrain, enemy weaknesses, and tactical opportunities.

Iron Fist.name: Iron Fist
Iron Fist.description: Strike with a fist conditioned to hardness through years of training.

Flowing Defense.name: Flowing Defense
Flowing Defense.description: Through graceful movement and perfect timing, redirect incoming attacks and flow around danger like water around stone.

Mind Over Matter.name: Mind Over Matter
Mind Over Matter.description: Channel spiritual power to push your body and mind beyond their natural limits, withstanding extremely harsh environments or physical and mental challenges.

Divine Smite.name: Divine Smite
Divine Smite.description: Channel sacred fury through your weapon. Your attack's holy power is more potent against unholy creatures.

Guardian Aura.name: Guardian Aura
Guardian Aura.description: Manifest a divine ward that shields yourself and nearby allies from harm.

Battle Zeal.name: Battle Zeal
Battle Zeal.description: Kindle your faith to fervor, rising above your body's normal limits through sacred devotion.

Hunter's Mark.name: Hunter's Mark
Hunter's Mark.description: Study your quarry to reveal their weaknesses and intuit their movements. Once marked, they cannot easily escape you.

Beast Bond.name: Beast Bond
Beast Bond.description: Draw on your bond with the world of beasts, calling a nearby creature to your aid or communicating with your companion.

Beast Shape.name: Beast Shape
Beast Shape.description: Shift your form into that of an animal, gaining its physical capabilities while retaining your mind.

Wilderness Stride.name: Wilderness Stride
Wilderness Stride.description: Move through any natural terrain unimpeded, leaving no trail and making no sound.

Cunning Gambit.name: Cunning Gambit
Cunning Gambit.description: Watch and wait for the ideal moment to exploit your opponent's weakness.

Dirty Fighting.name: Dirty Fighting
Dirty Fighting.description: Cast away honor in favor of victory, using every underhanded trick and improvised weapon at your disposal.

Eldritch Blast.name: Eldritch Blast
Eldritch Blast.description: Hurl a crackling beam of otherworldly energy - the signature attack granted by your patron.

Planar Pact.name: Planar Pact
Planar Pact.description: Call upon your patron to bend reality, perceive hidden truths, and manipulate supernatural forces.

Summon Soul Blade.name: Summon Soul Blade
Summon Soul Blade.description: Summon a spectral blade that hungers for combat, striking with eldritch force.

Spell Shaping.name: Spell Shaping
Spell Shaping.description: Modify your spell mid-casting - adjust its shape, intensity, or area to fit the situation perfectly.

Arcane Sight.name: Arcane Sight
Arcane Sight.description: Perceive magical currents and auras, seeing enchantments, illusions, and hidden magic.

Weapon Mastery.name: Weapon Mastery
Weapon Mastery.description: Show off your skill with a variety of weapons, using whatever is on hand to launch a barrage of flashy attacks.

Battle Control.name: Battle Control
Battle Control.description: Coordinate your strikes with your allies, launching into a powerful team attack.

Glamour.name: Glamour
Glamour.description: Create a small, simple illusion that can alter your appearance or create minor visual or auditory distractions.

Sacred Ward.name: Sacred Ward
Sacred Ward.description: Create a barrier of holy light that shields you or an ally from harm, deflecting attacks and warding against evil.

Turn Undead.name: Turn Undead
Turn Undead.description: Channel radiant power to repel undead creatures, forcing them to flee from your divine presence.

Second Wind.name: Second Wind
Second Wind.description: Push through exhaustion and injury with sheer human determination, recovering stamina and fighting on when others would fall.

Determined Stand.name: Determined Stand
Determined Stand.description: Refuse to go down. Plant your feet and endure what should break you.

Rally the Cause.name: Rally the Cause
Rally the Cause.description: Inspire those around you with passionate words, turning despair into resolve.

Stone Sense.name: Stone Sense
Stone Sense.description: Read the bones of the earth. Sense structural weaknesses, hidden passages, and the age of stonework by touch and instinct.

Dwarven Fortitude.name: Dwarven Fortitude
Dwarven Fortitude.description: Shrug off poison, alcohol, or toxins that would fell other races. Your constitution is legendary.

Ancestral Grudge.name: Ancestral Grudge
Ancestral Grudge.description: Channel generations of clan anger against a specific foe. Your attacks against them carry the weight of dwarven memory.

Slip Away.name: Slip Away
Slip Away.description: Wriggle free of grapples, bonds, or tight spaces that would trap larger folk.

Lucky Break.name: Lucky Break
Lucky Break.description: Halfling luck kicks in at the crucial moment. Turn a bad situation around through fortunate coincidence.

Brave Heart.name: Brave Heart
Brave Heart.description: Stand firm against fear, intimidation, and terror. Halflings are braver than they look.

Fight Through Pain.name: Fight Through Pain
Fight Through Pain.description: Ignore wounds that should slow you. Keep fighting when your body screams to stop.

War Cry.name: War Cry
War Cry.description: Let loose a terrifying battle shout that shakes enemy resolve and emboldens allies.

Ancestral Spirits.name: Ancestral Spirits
Ancestral Spirits.description: Call upon the spirits of orc ancestors for guidance, strength, or wisdom in a moment of need.

Breath Weapon.name: Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description: Exhale a cone of elemental energy - fire, frost, lightning, or acid depending on your draconic lineage.

Draconic Presence.name: Draconic Presence
Draconic Presence.description: Project the overwhelming authority of dragonkind. Lesser beings feel the urge to submit or flee.

Scale Hardening.name: Scale Hardening
Scale Hardening.description: Tense your scales into rigid armor, dramatically increasing your resistance to physical harm.

Darksight Focus.name: Darksight Focus
Darksight Focus.description: Concentrate your dark-adapted vision to see perfectly in absolute blackness where even other darkvision fails.

Shadow Drift.name: Shadow Drift
Shadow Drift.description: Move through darkness as though it were your element, leaving no trace and making no sound.

Ancestral Whispers.name: Ancestral Whispers
Ancestral Whispers.description: Draw on the long memory of the moon elf bloodline to recall ancient knowledge you never learned.

Forest Stride.name: Forest Stride
Forest Stride.description: Move through woodland terrain without trace or hindrance. Branches bend aside, leaves make no sound.

Nature's Voice.name: Nature's Voice
Nature's Voice.description: Commune briefly with plants or animals to learn what they have witnessed or sensed.

Natural Concealment.name: Natural Concealment
Natural Concealment.description: Blend into natural surroundings with uncanny effectiveness, becoming nearly invisible when still.

Claw Strike.name: Claw Strike
Claw Strike.description: Attack with your natural claws - always armed, always dangerous.

Perfect Landing.name: Perfect Landing
Perfect Landing.description: Always land on your feet. Reduce or negate fall damage through feline grace.

Predator's Nose.name: Predator's Nose
Predator's Nose.description: Track prey by scent alone, detecting trails, emotions, and hidden creatures.

Hellfire Touch.name: Hellfire Touch
Hellfire Touch.description: Channel infernal flames through your hands - fire that burns with the heat of the lower planes.

Fiendish Charm.name: Fiendish Charm
Fiendish Charm.description: Exert supernatural persuasion through your dark charisma, bending weaker wills to your suggestion.

Mental Fortress.name: Mental Fortress
Mental Fortress.description: Resist mental intrusion, domination, or psychic assault. Your mind bears demonic wards.

Mighty Grip.name: Mighty Grip
Mighty Grip.description: Wield weapons too large for normal folk, break restraints, crush what you hold.

Ground Slam.name: Ground Slam
Ground Slam.description: Stomp the earth with giant-born force, staggering nearby foes and cracking stone.

Endure Elements.name: Endure Elements
Endure Elements.description: Shrug off environmental extremes - bitter cold, searing heat, howling wind - that would kill lesser beings.

Venom Strike.name: Venom Strike
Venom Strike.description: Deliver poison through your fangs or a coated weapon. Your venom weakens and sickens.

Serpent's Gaze.name: Serpent's Gaze
Serpent's Gaze.description: Lock eyes with a target and exert hypnotic influence, freezing them in place or clouding their judgment.

Boneless Escape.name: Boneless Escape
Boneless Escape.description: Contort your serpentine body to slip through bindings, bars, or spaces that should be impassable.

Cultural Chameleon.name: Cultural Chameleon
Cultural Chameleon.description: Blend into any social group, adapting mannerisms and speech to fit in where others would stand out.

Read the Room.name: Read the Room
Read the Room.description: Quickly assess the social dynamics of a situation - who's in charge, who's lying, who's dangerous.

Elven Heritage.name: Elven Heritage
Elven Heritage.description: Draw on your elven blood to briefly enhance your senses, resist enchantment, or see in dim light.

Combat Stance.name: Combat Stance
Combat Stance.description: Shift into a practiced fighting stance that optimizes your balance, guard, and striking power for the situation at hand.

Press the Attack.name: Press the Attack
Press the Attack.description: Push forward relentlessly, giving your opponent no time to recover or regroup. Each strike drives them back.

Measured Retreat.name: Measured Retreat
Measured Retreat.description: Fall back without exposing yourself, maintaining your guard while creating distance. A tactical withdrawal, not a rout.

Disarming Strike.name: Disarming Strike
Disarming Strike.description: Target your opponent's weapon hand or weapon itself, sending their armament flying.

Bind and Control.name: Bind and Control
Bind and Control.description: Lock your weapon against your opponent's, controlling their blade while you maneuver for advantage.

Pommel Strike.name: Pommel Strike
Pommel Strike.description: Reverse your grip and slam the pommel into your opponent's face or body - brutal, unexpected, effective.

Half-Sword.name: Half-Sword
Half-Sword.description: Grip your blade midway for precise thrusting against armored opponents. Find the gaps.

Murder Stroke.name: Murder Stroke
Murder Stroke.description: Grip your sword by the blade and swing the crossguard like a war pick. Devastating against armor.

Grapple and Throw.name: Grapple and Throw
Grapple and Throw.description: Close to grappling range, seize your opponent, and hurl them to the ground.

Shield Punch.name: Shield Punch
Shield Punch.description: Drive your shield into your opponent's body or face, staggering them and creating an opening.

Riposte.name: Riposte
Riposte.description: Parry an incoming attack and immediately counter-thrust in a single fluid motion.

Cleaving Arc.name: Cleaving Arc
Cleaving Arc.description: Put your whole body into a massive horizontal sweep, striking everything in your path.

Shield Wall.name: Shield Wall
Shield Wall.description: Plant your shield and brace, becoming an immovable barrier. Nothing gets past.

Spinning Backfist.name: Spinning Backfist
Spinning Backfist.description: Rotate your whole body into an unexpected strike from an angle your opponent can't anticipate.

Read the Fight.name: Read the Fight
Read the Fight.description: Study your opponent's movements, predicting their next attack before they make it.

Expose Weakness.name: Expose Weakness
Expose Weakness.description: Call out an enemy's flaw or failure, making them hesitate and doubt.

Tactical Reposition.name: Tactical Reposition
Tactical Reposition.description: Move yourself or an ally to a superior position mid-combat without exposing anyone to attack.

Predict and Punish.name: Predict and Punish
Predict and Punish.description: Anticipate exactly what your opponent will do and position yourself to make them pay for it.

Bait and Switch.name: Bait and Switch
Bait and Switch.description: Fake an opening to lure your opponent into overcommitting, then capitalize on their mistake.

Control the Engagement.name: Control the Engagement
Control the Engagement.description: Dictate the pace and distance of the fight. Your opponent can only act when you let them.

Perfect Counter.name: Perfect Counter
Perfect Counter.description: Wait for the exact moment of vulnerability and deliver a devastatingly precise counter-attack.

Hold the Line.name: Hold the Line
Hold the Line.description: Command your allies to stand firm. Your presence steadies their nerve and strengthens their defense.

Coordinated Assault.name: Coordinated Assault
Coordinated Assault.description: Call out a target and coordinate your allies to strike as one, overwhelming defenses.

Inspiring Charge.name: Inspiring Charge
Inspiring Charge.description: Lead from the front, crashing into enemy lines. Your courage pulls allies forward with you.

Veteran's Guidance.name: Veteran's Guidance
Veteran's Guidance.description: Share your combat experience mid-fight, correcting an ally's form or warning them of danger.

Final Stand.name: Final Stand
Final Stand.description: Rally your allies for one last desperate effort. When all seems lost, refuse to accept defeat.

Commander's Presence.name: Commander's Presence
Commander's Presence.description: Your mere presence on the battlefield inspires confidence. Allies fight harder knowing you're with them.

Steel Mind.name: Steel Mind
Steel Mind.description: Focus your trained discipline to resist mental intrusion, fear, or magical compulsion.

Shake It Off.name: Shake It Off
Shake It Off.description: Through pure willpower, throw off a magical effect, poison, or condition that's affecting you.

Spell Breaker.name: Spell Breaker
Spell Breaker.description: Strike a caster at the critical moment of spellcasting, disrupting their magic through precise violence.

Unbreakable.name: Unbreakable
Unbreakable.description: Refuse to fall. Through sheer stubborn will, remain standing when you should collapse.

Cut the Magic.name: Cut the Magic
Cut the Magic.description: Slice through magical constructs, barriers, or enchantments with a blade backed by killing intent.

No Surrender.name: No Surrender
No Surrender.description: Your will cannot be broken. Resist domination, possession, or any attempt to control your actions.

Mage Killer.name: Mage Killer
Mage Killer.description: Years of fighting spellcasters have taught you exactly how they think and move. Close the distance and end them.

Burst of Strength.name: Burst of Strength
Burst of Strength.description: Channel everything into a single explosive effort - lifting, breaking, pushing beyond normal limits.

Endless Stamina.name: Endless Stamina
Endless Stamina.description: Keep fighting when others would collapse from exhaustion. Your conditioning is legendary.

Lightning Reflexes.name: Lightning Reflexes
Lightning Reflexes.description: React with trained speed that borders on precognition. Move before conscious thought catches up.

Devastating Blow.name: Devastating Blow
Devastating Blow.description: Put everything - body weight, momentum, technique, intent - into a single catastrophic strike.

Iron Body.name: Iron Body
Iron Body.description: Tense your muscles and set your stance to absorb impacts that would shatter normal bodies.

Flurry of Steel.name: Flurry of Steel
Flurry of Steel.description: Unleash a barrage of strikes faster than the eye can follow, overwhelming any defense through sheer volume.

Perfect Form.name: Perfect Form
Perfect Form.description: Execute a technique with absolute precision - every angle, every vector, every ounce of force exactly where it needs to be.

Warrior's Glare.name: Warrior's Glare
Warrior's Glare.description: Fix an opponent with a stare that communicates exactly how badly this will go for them.

Show of Force.name: Show of Force
Show of Force.description: Demonstrate your combat prowess in a way that makes violence seem unnecessary. They've already lost.

Demand Surrender.name: Demand Surrender
Demand Surrender.description: With absolute authority, order your enemies to lay down arms. Many will.

Killing Intent.name: Killing Intent
Killing Intent.description: Project your murderous focus so intensely that weaker opponents freeze in terror.

One Against Many.name: One Against Many
One Against Many.description: Face multiple opponents simultaneously, flowing from one to the next, each strike perfect and lethal.

Deathblow.name: Deathblow
Deathblow.description: When an opponent is truly vulnerable, deliver a single strike with absolute killing intent. End it.

Living Legend.name: Living Legend
Living Legend.description: Your reputation precedes you. Enemies hesitate, allies take heart, and everyone knows who you are.

Warlord.name: Warlord
Warlord.description: Command the entire battlefield. Position allies, direct attacks, and orchestrate victory through tactical genius.

Swordmaster.name: Swordmaster
Swordmaster.description: You have transcended normal skill. Every movement is a work of art, every cut perfect. You cannot be defeated by swordwork alone.

Indomitable.name: Indomitable
Indomitable.description: You simply will not be stopped. Not by pain, not by magic, not by death itself until your work is done.

Enter the Trance.name: Enter the Trance
Enter the Trance.description: Begin the sacred battle meditation, inviting your beast spirit to rise. Everything becomes clearer, simpler, more violent.

Savage Howl.name: Savage Howl
Savage Howl.description: Release a primal scream that announces your presence and intent. Let everyone know what's coming.

Reckless Swing.name: Reckless Swing
Reckless Swing.description: Abandon all defense and throw everything into a wild, powerful attack.

Wolf Spirit.name: Wolf Spirit
Wolf Spirit.description: Call on the wolf within - move with the pack, circle your prey, strike together with allies.

Bear Spirit.name: Bear Spirit
Bear Spirit.description: Invoke the bear - stand your ground, absorb punishment, crush what stands before you.

Boar Spirit.name: Boar Spirit
Boar Spirit.description: Channel the boar - charge forward unstoppably, gore anything in your path, feel no pain.

Raven Spirit.name: Raven Spirit
Raven Spirit.description: Let the raven guide you - see the battlefield from above, know where death will fall, be there first.

Serpent Spirit.name: Serpent Spirit
Serpent Spirit.description: Move like the serpent - strike without warning, slide past defenses, poison your presence in their minds.

Spirit Surge.name: Spirit Surge
Spirit Surge.description: Let the beast spirit flood through you completely, temporarily surrendering control for overwhelming power.

Predator's Eyes.name: Predator's Eyes
Predator's Eyes.description: See through your beast spirit's eyes - spot weakness, sense fear, track prey through any terrain.

Feral Instinct.name: Feral Instinct
Feral Instinct.description: Let animal instinct guide your movements - react before thought, sense danger before it strikes.

Blood Offering.name: Blood Offering
Blood Offering.description: Spill your own blood as an offering to the spirits, trading vitality for power in your next action.

Taste of Blood.name: Taste of Blood
Taste of Blood.description: When you draw enemy blood, gain a surge of vitality and awareness.

Wound Rage.name: Wound Rage
Wound Rage.description: Channel the pain of your injuries into your strikes. The more you bleed, the harder you hit.

Life Drinker.name: Life Drinker
Life Drinker.description: Tear life force from a wounded enemy through your weapon. Their vitality becomes yours.

Crimson Mist.name: Crimson Mist
Crimson Mist.description: Let your blood spray and hang in the air around you, marking your territory, choking your enemies.

Bloody Defiance.name: Bloody Defiance
Bloody Defiance.description: Smear your blood across your face and roar defiance. Pain is nothing. Fear is nothing. There is only battle.

Heartbeat Sense.name: Heartbeat Sense
Heartbeat Sense.description: Feel the pulse of living things around you through the blood you share. Nothing hides from the hunter.

Blood Tide.name: Blood Tide
Blood Tide.description: In the chaos of battle, draw on the spilled blood around you - friend and foe alike - to fuel your rampage.

Skull Crack.name: Skull Crack
Skull Crack.description: Bring your weapon down on your enemy's head with bone-shattering force.

Gut Strike.name: Gut Strike
Gut Strike.description: Drive your weapon into the soft belly. Brutal, effective, terrifying to watch.

Wild Swings.name: Wild Swings
Wild Swings.description: Abandon technique for volume - swing your weapon in unpredictable arcs that are nearly impossible to anticipate.

Throw and Follow.name: Throw and Follow
Throw and Follow.description: Hurl your weapon at your enemy, then charge in behind it before they can react.

Headbutt.name: Headbutt
Headbutt.description: Slam your forehead into a target's face - brutal and unexpected.

Biting Frenzy.name: Biting Frenzy
Biting Frenzy.description: When grappling, use teeth and nails like the animal you've become. No rules, no honor, just survival.

Shoulder Charge.name: Shoulder Charge
Shoulder Charge.description: Lower your shoulder and barrel into your enemy, knocking them down through sheer momentum.

Cleave Through.name: Cleave Through
Cleave Through.description: Don't stop at one enemy - carry your swing through the first target and into the next.

Maul.name: Maul
Maul.description: Knock your enemy down and don't stop hitting until they stop moving.

Ancestor's Strength.name: Ancestor's Strength
Ancestor's Strength.description: Call on the warriors who came before, feeling their strength flow into your limbs.

Voices of the Fallen.name: Voices of the Fallen
Voices of the Fallen.description: Hear the whispered guidance of dead warriors, their battle wisdom passing to you in moments of need.

Ancestral Wrath.name: Ancestral Wrath
Ancestral Wrath.description: Channel the fury of generations of warriors, their rage joining yours in a devastating assault.

Ghost Warriors.name: Ghost Warriors
Ghost Warriors.description: Call your ancestors to fight beside you - their spectral forms visible for a moment, their attacks very real.

Blood Memory.name: Blood Memory
Blood Memory.description: Access skills and knowledge carried in your bloodline - techniques your ancestors knew that you never learned.

Deathless Fury.name: Deathless Fury
Deathless Fury.description: Your ancestors refuse to let you fall. Channel their defiance to keep fighting through wounds that should end you.

Bloodcurdling Scream.name: Bloodcurdling Scream
Bloodcurdling Scream.description: Release a scream that isn't entirely human - something of the beast spirit bleeds through.

Eyes of the Beast.name: Eyes of the Beast
Eyes of the Beast.description: Let your eyes change to those of your spirit animal. Stare down your prey with inhuman intensity.

Froth and Fury.name: Froth and Fury
Froth and Fury.description: Work yourself into visible madness - foam at the mouth, snarl, become something no sane person wants to fight.

Trophy Display.name: Trophy Display
Trophy Display.description: Show your enemy what you did to the last one. Let them imagine being next.

Walk Through Fire.name: Walk Through Fire
Walk Through Fire.description: Advance steadily through whatever they throw at you - arrows, magic, blades - without slowing, without flinching.

Death's Herald.name: Death's Herald
Death's Herald.description: Project an aura of imminent violence so intense that weaker enemies simply flee rather than face you.

Ignore the Pain.name: Ignore the Pain
Ignore the Pain.description: Push the pain down deep and keep moving. Deal with it later. Or don't.

Stubborn Vitality.name: Stubborn Vitality
Stubborn Vitality.description: Refuse to weaken. Through rage and will, force your body to perform when it should collapse.

Battle Trance.name: Battle Trance
Battle Trance.description: Enter a state where pain is distant, fear is silent, and nothing exists but the enemy before you.

Unnatural Endurance.name: Unnatural Endurance
Unnatural Endurance.description: The beast spirit sustains you beyond mortal limits. You don't need rest. You don't need food. You need blood.

Rise Again.name: Rise Again
Rise Again.description: Get back up. No matter how many times they knock you down, get back up and make them regret it.

Unstoppable Rampage.name: Unstoppable Rampage
Unstoppable Rampage.description: Become a whirlwind of destruction, carving through everything in your path without slowing or stopping.

Avatar of Wrath.name: Avatar of Wrath
Avatar of Wrath.description: Surrender completely to the beast spirit. For a time, you are not yourself - you are something older, stronger, and far more dangerous.

Deathseeker.name: Deathseeker
Deathseeker.description: Embrace the beautiful death. Fight with no thought of survival, only glory. This makes you terrifyingly effective.

Spirit Merge.name: Spirit Merge
Spirit Merge.description: Fully merge with your beast spirit, gaining its physical aspects - claws, fangs, hide, whatever form your spirit takes.

Legendary Ferocity.name: Legendary Ferocity
Legendary Ferocity.description: Your fury has become the stuff of legend. Strike with the force of all the berserkers who came before you.

Undying Rage.name: Undying Rage
Undying Rage.description: Your rage refuses to let you die. Keep fighting through mortal wounds until every enemy is down or you literally cannot move.

Sacred Vow.name: Sacred Vow
Sacred Vow.description: Speak your oath aloud, renewing your conviction and drawing power from your sacred promise.

Righteous Stand.name: Righteous Stand
Righteous Stand.description: Plant yourself between evil and the innocent. While you stand, nothing passes.

Holy Resolve.name: Holy Resolve
Holy Resolve.description: Draw on your oath to steel your will against fear, temptation, and despair.

Blazing Smite.name: Blazing Smite
Blazing Smite.description: Your weapon erupts with holy fire as you strike, burning the wicked with sacred flames.

Thunderous Smite.name: Thunderous Smite
Thunderous Smite.description: Channel divine thunder through your blow. The impact echoes with heavenly authority.

Wrathful Smite.name: Wrathful Smite
Wrathful Smite.description: Channel your righteous anger into a strike that overwhelms the target with visions of divine judgment.

Searing Smite.name: Searing Smite
Searing Smite.description: Brand your enemy with holy light. The mark burns them from within, a wound that will not heal easily.

Blinding Smite.name: Blinding Smite
Blinding Smite.description: Your weapon flashes with brilliance as it strikes, overwhelming your enemy with searing light.

Banishing Smite.name: Banishing Smite
Banishing Smite.description: Strike with the authority to cast out. Fiends and undead feel the pull of oblivion in your blow.

Execution Strike.name: Execution Strike
Execution Strike.description: Deliver divine judgment with a single, final blow. This is not combat - this is sentencing.

Shield the Fallen.name: Shield the Fallen
Shield the Fallen.description: Stand over a wounded ally, interposing yourself between them and all threats.

Divine Shield.name: Divine Shield
Divine Shield.description: Raise your shield and invoke divine protection. Holy light reinforces the barrier.

Take the Blow.name: Take the Blow
Take the Blow.description: Intercept an attack meant for another, accepting the harm yourself so they remain unharmed.

Sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
Sanctuary.description: Declare a person under divine protection. Attacking them becomes difficult - something turns violence aside.

Martyr's Guard.name: Martyr's Guard
Martyr's Guard.description: Declare yourself willing to suffer for others. Harm meant for your allies flows to you instead.

Unbreakable Oath.name: Unbreakable Oath
Unbreakable Oath.description: Swear to protect someone or something. Until you die or succeed, nothing can make you abandon them.

Sense Evil.name: Sense Evil
Sense Evil.description: Open your awareness to the presence of evil. Feel corruption, malice, and unholy presence nearby.

Accusing Glare.name: Accusing Glare
Accusing Glare.description: Fix your gaze on a wrongdoer. Let them feel the weight of their crimes in your eyes.

Condemn.name: Condemn
Condemn.description: Speak judgment against an evildoer. Your words carry divine weight, marking them as guilty.

Truth Compulsion.name: Truth Compulsion
Truth Compulsion.description: Demand truth in the name of your oath. Lies become difficult to speak in your presence.

Mark of Justice.name: Mark of Justice
Mark of Justice.description: Place a divine mark on an evildoer. They cannot hide - you will always know where they are.

Voice of Authority.name: Voice of Authority
Voice of Authority.description: Speak with divine command. Your words compel obedience from those whose will is weak or conscience is guilty.

Final Judgment.name: Final Judgment
Final Judgment.description: Pronounce sentence on the guilty. Your words seal their fate, and your next strike carries the weight of divine law.

Lay on Hands.name: Lay on Hands
Lay on Hands.description: Touch a wounded person and channel divine healing through your hands. Simple, direct, powerful.

Cleanse Affliction.name: Cleanse Affliction
Cleanse Affliction.description: Purge poison, disease, or corruption from a person through sacred touch.

Merciful Touch.name: Merciful Touch
Merciful Touch.description: Ease suffering with divine compassion. Calm pain, soothe fear, bring peace to the dying.

Restore the Fallen.name: Restore the Fallen
Restore the Fallen.description: Pour your own vitality into a gravely wounded ally, pulling them back from death's edge.

Purifying Light.name: Purifying Light
Purifying Light.description: Bathe a cursed or corrupted person in holy light, burning away the darkness that clings to them.

Aura of Courage.name: Aura of Courage
Aura of Courage.description: Radiate calm resolve. Those near you find their fears quieting, their courage rising.

Aura of Devotion.name: Aura of Devotion
Aura of Devotion.description: Project unwavering faith. Allies near you find it easier to resist enchantment and temptation.

Aura of Vitality.name: Aura of Vitality
Aura of Vitality.description: Channel healing energy outward. Wounds close slowly but steadily for everyone near you.

Aura of Warding.name: Aura of Warding
Aura of Warding.description: Extend your divine protection. Those near you share in your resistance to harm.

Aura of Menace.name: Aura of Menace
Aura of Menace.description: Let righteous threat radiate from you. Evil creatures hesitate to approach, their instincts screaming danger.

Aura of Truth.name: Aura of Truth
Aura of Truth.description: Radiate honesty. Deception becomes difficult within your presence - lies feel wrong to speak.

Call Steed.name: Call Steed
Call Steed.description: Summon your bonded mount to your side. The connection between you transcends distance.

Mounted Charge.name: Mounted Charge
Mounted Charge.description: Spur your mount into a devastating charge, crashing into enemy lines with unstoppable momentum.

Steed's Blessing.name: Steed's Blessing
Steed's Blessing.description: Extend your divine protection to your mount, sharing your holy resilience.

Trample the Wicked.name: Trample the Wicked
Trample the Wicked.description: Ride down your enemies without mercy. Your mount shares your righteous fury.

Sacred Bond.name: Sacred Bond
Sacred Bond.description: Deepen the connection with your mount until you move as one being, anticipating each other perfectly.

Rebuke the Unholy.name: Rebuke the Unholy
Rebuke the Unholy.description: Speak condemnation against fiends and undead. Your words burn them like holy fire.

Sacred Weapon.name: Sacred Weapon
Sacred Weapon.description: Invoke a blessing upon your weapon, wreathing it in holy light that sears unholy flesh.

Holy Ground.name: Holy Ground
Holy Ground.description: Consecrate the ground beneath your feet. Undead and fiends find it painful to stand here.

Destroy Undead.name: Destroy Undead
Destroy Undead.description: Blast lesser undead with divine power, reducing them to dust instantly.

Banish Fiend.name: Banish Fiend
Banish Fiend.description: Cast a fiend back to whatever hell spawned it. Your authority over them is absolute.

Words of Valor.name: Words of Valor
Words of Valor.description: Speak encouragement that carries divine weight. Your words strengthen resolve and steady hands.

Lead the Charge.name: Lead the Charge
Lead the Charge.description: Rush forward into danger, trusting others to follow. They will.

Rally the Faithful.name: Rally the Faithful
Rally the Faithful.description: Call upon shared faith to unite a group in purpose and determination.

Champion's Challenge.name: Champion's Challenge
Champion's Challenge.description: Call out the enemy leader for single combat. Honor, pride, or divine compulsion - something makes them answer.

Avatar of Light.name: Avatar of Light
Avatar of Light.description: Become a vessel for divine radiance. Light pours from you, burning evil and sheltering the innocent.

Wrath of Heaven.name: Wrath of Heaven
Wrath of Heaven.description: Call down divine judgment on the battlefield. For a moment, you are the instrument of holy vengeance.

Undying Devotion.name: Undying Devotion
Undying Devotion.description: Your oath refuses to let you fall while innocents remain in danger. Keep fighting through anything.

Eternal Guardian.name: Eternal Guardian
Eternal Guardian.description: Swear an oath of protection so absolute that nothing - not death, not gods, not time - will stop you from fulfilling it.

Holy Crusader.name: Holy Crusader
Holy Crusader.description: Embody the perfect union of martial prowess and divine purpose. Every strike is a prayer, every victory a sacrament.

Healing Prayer.name: Healing Prayer
Healing Prayer.description: Speak a prayer of restoration over a wounded person, channeling divine energy to mend their injuries.

Sacred Word.name: Sacred Word
Sacred Word.description: Speak a word of power in the divine tongue, carrying authority that echoes beyond the mortal.

Invoke Protection.name: Invoke Protection
Invoke Protection.description: Call upon divine protection for yourself or another, asking for shelter from harm.

Faithful Resolve.name: Faithful Resolve
Faithful Resolve.description: Draw strength from your faith to steady your will and calm your fears.

Prayer of Healing.name: Prayer of Healing
Prayer of Healing.description: Offer an extended prayer over the wounded, channeling sustained healing energy.

Prayer of Guidance.name: Prayer of Guidance
Prayer of Guidance.description: Ask for divine direction when the path is unclear. Sometimes an answer comes.

Prayer of Strength.name: Prayer of Strength
Prayer of Strength.description: Call upon divine might to bolster the weak, giving them power beyond their natural limits.

Prayer of Deliverance.name: Prayer of Deliverance
Prayer of Deliverance.description: Cry out for divine rescue in desperate circumstances. Beg for salvation when all seems lost.

Fervent Prayer.name: Fervent Prayer
Fervent Prayer.description: Pour your whole being into a single desperate plea. The intensity of faith matters.

Communion.name: Communion
Communion.description: Enter deep prayer to commune with the divine, seeking knowledge, wisdom, or simple presence.

Intercession.name: Intercession
Intercession.description: Pray on behalf of another, asking for divine favor to be extended to them specifically.

Mend Wounds.name: Mend Wounds
Mend Wounds.description: Channel restorative energy through your hands, closing cuts and soothing bruises.

Cure Ailment.name: Cure Ailment
Cure Ailment.description: Purge sickness, poison, or disease from a suffering person through divine power.

Restore Vitality.name: Restore Vitality
Restore Vitality.description: Replenish exhausted energy and depleted strength, bringing vigor back to the weary.

Healing Circle.name: Healing Circle
Healing Circle.description: Channel healing energy outward in all directions, mending everyone nearby.

Purify Body.name: Purify Body
Purify Body.description: Cleanse a body of all impurities - toxins, corruption, foreign substances.

Stabilize.name: Stabilize
Stabilize.description: Halt the dying process, preventing a gravely wounded person from slipping away.

Greater Restoration.name: Greater Restoration
Greater Restoration.description: Channel powerful healing to cure serious injuries, restore lost function, and undo lasting harm.

Regenerate.name: Regenerate
Regenerate.description: Restore what was lost - regrow severed limbs, repair destroyed organs, reverse permanent damage.

Mass Healing.name: Mass Healing
Mass Healing.description: Channel an enormous surge of healing energy, mending the wounds of many at once.

Preserve Life.name: Preserve Life
Preserve Life.description: Pour divine energy into keeping someone alive through injuries that should kill them instantly.

Ease Suffering.name: Ease Suffering
Ease Suffering.description: Remove pain and bring comfort. Sometimes healing the spirit matters as much as healing the body.

Cleansing Touch.name: Cleansing Touch
Cleansing Touch.description: Remove curses, break enchantments, and lift magical afflictions through divine purification.

Bless.name: Bless
Bless.description: Invoke divine favor upon allies, granting them fortune in their endeavors.

Shield of Faith.name: Shield of Faith
Shield of Faith.description: Surround a person with a shimmering barrier of divine protection.

Ward Against Evil.name: Ward Against Evil
Ward Against Evil.description: Place divine protection upon someone that specifically guards against malevolent forces.

Blessing of Fortitude.name: Blessing of Fortitude
Blessing of Fortitude.description: Grant divine resilience to withstand hardship, pain, and exhaustion.

Blessing of Wisdom.name: Blessing of Wisdom
Blessing of Wisdom.description: Ask for divine insight to be granted to another, sharpening their mind and judgment.

Divine Aegis.name: Divine Aegis
Divine Aegis.description: Call down powerful divine protection, shielding someone from a specific imminent threat.

Consecrated Ground.name: Consecrated Ground
Consecrated Ground.description: Bless the ground beneath you, making it holy. The faithful are strengthened here, the unholy weakened.

Spell Ward.name: Spell Ward
Spell Ward.description: Invoke divine protection against hostile magic, creating a barrier that deflects sorcery.

Sacred Flame.name: Sacred Flame
Sacred Flame.description: Call down a pillar of divine fire upon an enemy. Holy flame that burns the wicked.

Word of Radiance.name: Word of Radiance
Word of Radiance.description: Speak a word of power that bursts outward in searing light, burning those nearby.

Guiding Bolt.name: Guiding Bolt
Guiding Bolt.description: Launch a streak of divine light at an enemy. The light marks them, making them easier to strike.

Divine Rebuke.name: Divine Rebuke
Divine Rebuke.description: Strike back against an attacker with holy energy. Those who harm the faithful are punished.

Flame Strike.name: Flame Strike
Flame Strike.description: Call a column of divine fire and radiance down from the heavens.

Holy Wrath.name: Holy Wrath
Holy Wrath.description: Channel the fury of the divine through your words and gestures, smiting enemies with sacred power.

Righteous Condemnation.name: Righteous Condemnation
Righteous Condemnation.description: Pronounce divine judgment upon the wicked. Your words carry the weight of heaven's displeasure.

Sunburst.name: Sunburst
Sunburst.description: Release an explosion of brilliant divine light that sears the unholy and illuminates all shadows.

Repel Undead.name: Repel Undead
Repel Undead.description: Project divine energy that forces undead to retreat from your presence.

Halt Undead.name: Halt Undead
Halt Undead.description: Command undead creatures to stop, holding them in place with divine authority.

Disrupt Undead.name: Disrupt Undead
Disrupt Undead.description: Channel energy that tears at the animating force holding undead together.

Command Undead.name: Command Undead
Command Undead.description: Seize control of an undead creature through divine authority, turning it against its master.

Consecrate Remains.name: Consecrate Remains
Consecrate Remains.description: Bless a corpse so it cannot be raised as undead. Grant peace to the departed.

Banish Spirit.name: Banish Spirit
Banish Spirit.description: Cast an undead spirit back to whatever afterlife awaits it, ending its unnatural existence.

Last Rites.name: Last Rites
Last Rites.description: Perform the sacred ceremony for the dying or recently dead, easing their passage.

Soul Flare.name: Soul Flare
Soul Flare.description: Release a burst of elemental force drawn from the soul bound within your body. The energy manifests according to the material you are made from — stone, iron, crystal, or stranger things.

Purification Rite.name: Purification Rite
Purification Rite.description: Cleanse a person, place, or object of spiritual contamination through sacred ritual.

Consecration.name: Consecration
Consecration.description: Dedicate a place or object to the divine, making it sacred and imbuing it with holy power.

Exorcism Rite.name: Exorcism Rite
Exorcism Rite.description: Perform the sacred ritual to cast out possessing spirits, demons, or malevolent influences.

Atonement.name: Atonement
Atonement.description: Guide a penitent through the ritual of atonement, allowing them to be cleansed of spiritual burden.

Sacred Oath Binding.name: Sacred Oath Binding
Sacred Oath Binding.description: Witness and seal an oath with divine power. Breaking it will have consequences.

Divine Invocation.name: Divine Invocation
Divine Invocation.description: Perform a major ritual calling directly upon divine attention. Rarely used, deeply powerful.

Counsel.name: Counsel
Counsel.description: Offer spiritual guidance drawn from wisdom and faith. Help someone find their way.

Comfort the Grieving.name: Comfort the Grieving
Comfort the Grieving.description: Bring solace to those in mourning, helping them process loss and find peace.

Calm Emotions.name: Calm Emotions
Calm Emotions.description: Soothe heightened emotions in an area - end rage, panic, or hostility with a calming melody.

Spiritual Authority.name: Spiritual Authority
Spiritual Authority.description: Speak with the weight of your faith and office. Your words carry moral force.

Inspire Virtue.name: Inspire Virtue
Inspire Virtue.description: Call upon the better nature of those around you, inspiring them to moral courage.

Confession.name: Confession
Confession.description: Create a sacred space for someone to unburden themselves of guilt and secrets.

Voice of Reason.name: Voice of Reason
Voice of Reason.description: Cut through confusion and conflict with clarity and wisdom that others cannot ignore.

Divine Sense.name: Divine Sense
Divine Sense.description: Open your awareness to the presence of good, evil, and the supernatural nearby.

Augury.name: Augury
Augury.description: Perform a quick divination to determine if a proposed action will lead to good or ill.

Divination.name: Divination
Divination.description: Seek specific divine guidance about a situation, person, or course of action.

Prophetic Vision.name: Prophetic Vision
Prophetic Vision.description: Receive a glimpse of what may come - fragmentary, symbolic, but sometimes crucial.

Miracle.name: Miracle
Miracle.description: Ask for the impossible. Sometimes, rarely, the divine answers in ways that defy all expectation.

Resurrection.name: Resurrection
Resurrection.description: Call a departed soul back from beyond, returning life to one who has died.

Divine Avatar.name: Divine Avatar
Divine Avatar.description: Become a vessel for divine presence, temporarily channeling sacred power directly through your being.

Word of Power.name: Word of Power
Word of Power.description: Speak a single word in the divine tongue that reshapes reality according to its meaning.

Sanctuary of Faith.name: Sanctuary of Faith
Sanctuary of Faith.description: Create a zone of absolute divine protection where the faithful cannot be harmed.

High Priest.name: High Priest
High Priest.description: Embody the pinnacle of clerical power - your prayers are heard, your rituals succeed, your authority is undeniable.

Ranger's Patience.name: Ranger's Patience
Ranger's Patience.description: Settle into stillness, waiting for the perfect moment. Patience is a hunter's greatest weapon.

Natural Awareness.name: Natural Awareness
Natural Awareness.description: Attune to your surroundings, sensing when something is wrong - unnatural silence, disturbed animals, hidden watchers.

Track Prey.name: Track Prey
Track Prey.description: Follow a trail through any terrain. Broken twigs, bent grass, disturbed soil - everything tells a story.

Identify Spoor.name: Identify Spoor
Identify Spoor.description: Examine tracks, droppings, or other signs to determine exactly what creature made them and when.

Predict Movement.name: Predict Movement
Predict Movement.description: Understand your prey well enough to know where they're going, not just where they've been.

Tireless Pursuit.name: Tireless Pursuit
Tireless Pursuit.description: Keep following your quarry long after they think they've escaped. You don't need to be faster - just more persistent.

Drive Prey.name: Drive Prey
Drive Prey.description: Herd your quarry where you want them - toward a trap, an ambush, or difficult terrain.

Scent Trail.name: Scent Trail
Scent Trail.description: Follow a scent like a hound - useful when visual trails fail or in darkness.

Know Your Prey.name: Know Your Prey
Know Your Prey.description: Draw on everything you know about a creature type - habits, weaknesses, behaviors, vulnerabilities.

Nowhere to Hide.name: Nowhere to Hide
Nowhere to Hide.description: Once you have marked something, it cannot escape you. You will find it eventually.

Master Tracker.name: Master Tracker
Master Tracker.description: Follow trails that should be impossible - days old, through water, over stone, through magical concealment.

Precise Shot.name: Precise Shot
Precise Shot.description: Take careful aim, placing your arrow exactly where you intend.

Rapid Fire.name: Rapid Fire
Rapid Fire.description: Nock and loose arrows in quick succession, filling the air with shafts.

Called Shot.name: Called Shot
Called Shot.description: Target a specific point - an eye, a joint, a weapon hand. Sacrifice speed for precision.

Arcing Shot.name: Arcing Shot
Arcing Shot.description: Loft an arrow over obstacles or walls to strike targets you cannot directly see.

Pinning Shot.name: Pinning Shot
Pinning Shot.description: Pin a target's clothing or limb to a surface, restricting their movement.

Long Shot.name: Long Shot
Long Shot.description: Push your bow to its absolute limits, striking targets at extreme range.

Arrow Storm.name: Arrow Storm
Arrow Storm.description: Launch a barrage of arrows into an area, making it deadly to enter or remain.

Disabling Shot.name: Disabling Shot
Disabling Shot.description: Target tendons, muscles, or joints to cripple your target's ability to fight or flee.

Death From Above.name: Death From Above
Death From Above.description: Fire from elevated position with devastating accuracy - gravity and angle working in your favor.

One Shot, One Kill.name: One Shot, One Kill
One Shot, One Kill.description: Line up the perfect shot - patient, precise, lethal. This arrow ends the fight.

Running Shot.name: Running Shot
Running Shot.description: Loose accurate arrows while moving at full speed, never presenting a stationary target.

Find Water.name: Find Water
Find Water.description: Read the land to locate water sources - following animal trails, vegetation patterns, and terrain.

Forage.name: Forage
Forage.description: Find edible plants, roots, and small game even in seemingly barren terrain.

Weather Eye.name: Weather Eye
Weather Eye.description: Read the sky, wind, and animal behavior to predict weather changes before they arrive.

Make Camp.name: Make Camp
Make Camp.description: Quickly establish a secure, concealed campsite that provides shelter and safety.

Natural Remedy.name: Natural Remedy
Natural Remedy.description: Find and prepare plants that can treat wounds, fight infection, or counter poison.

Travel Light.name: Travel Light
Travel Light.description: Move quickly across country, covering ground that would exhaust others.

Danger Sense.name: Danger Sense
Danger Sense.description: Feel when something is wrong - predators watching, traps ahead, ambush waiting.

Terrain Mastery.name: Terrain Mastery
Terrain Mastery.description: Know this type of terrain intimately - every advantage it offers, every danger it hides.

Live Off the Land.name: Live Off the Land
Live Off the Land.description: Sustain yourself indefinitely in the wilderness, needing nothing from civilization.

Endure the Elements.name: Endure the Elements
Endure the Elements.description: Push through extreme conditions - blizzard, desert heat, driving rain - that would stop others.

Call Companion.name: Call Companion
Call Companion.description: Summon your bonded animal companion to your side, no matter where they were.

Pack Tactics.name: Pack Tactics
Pack Tactics.description: Coordinate with your companion to flank, harry, and overwhelm a target together.

Send Scout.name: Send Scout
Send Scout.description: Direct your companion to scout ahead and return with information about what lies there.

Companion's Senses.name: Companion's Senses
Companion's Senses.description: Rely on your companion's superior senses - their nose, ears, or eyes better than yours.

Guard Command.name: Guard Command
Guard Command.description: Direct your companion to protect a person or place, alerting you to any threat.

Fetch and Retrieve.name: Fetch and Retrieve
Fetch and Retrieve.description: Send your companion to retrieve an object, carry a message, or bring something back.

Shared Training.name: Shared Training
Shared Training.description: Years of partnership mean your companion understands complex commands and responds instantly.

Companion's Fury.name: Companion's Fury
Companion's Fury.description: Unleash your companion in a savage attack - they fight without restraint at your command.

Unbreakable Bond.name: Unbreakable Bond
Unbreakable Bond.description: Your bond transcends normal animal handling - you sense each other's needs, fears, and intentions.

Wild Friends.name: Wild Friends
Wild Friends.description: Befriend wild animals quickly, gaining their trust and cooperation even without a bond.

Blend In.name: Blend In
Blend In.description: Look like you belong wherever you are - a servant, a guest, a worker, nobody suspicious.

Silent Stalker.name: Silent Stalker
Silent Stalker.description: Move through terrain without making a sound - no snapping twigs, no rustling leaves.

Ambush.name: Ambush
Ambush.description: Strike from concealment with devastating surprise. The first blow lands before they know you're there.

Vanish.name: Vanish
Vanish.description: Break contact and disappear into the terrain, leaving enemies searching for someone no longer there.

Camouflage.name: Camouflage
Camouflage.description: Construct concealment from natural materials - a hide, a blind, a covered position.

Ghost of the Woods.name: Ghost of the Woods
Ghost of the Woods.description: Move through the forest like a spirit - present one moment, gone the next, tracks erased.

Hide in Plain Sight.name: Hide in Plain Sight
Hide in Plain Sight.description: Remain unseen even when enemies are looking directly at you, as long as you stay absolutely still.

Set Snare.name: Set Snare
Set Snare.description: Quickly set a simple trap to catch or slow prey passing through.

Pit Trap.name: Pit Trap
Pit Trap.description: Dig and conceal a pit to catch larger prey or enemies.

Deadfall.name: Deadfall
Deadfall.description: Rig a heavy weight to fall on prey that triggers it - dangerous and effective.

Spike Trap.name: Spike Trap
Spike Trap.description: Prepare concealed spikes that punish anyone who steps in the wrong place.

Kill Zone.name: Kill Zone
Kill Zone.description: Prepare an entire area with multiple traps, snares, and hazards - a death trap for the unwary.

Spot Trap.name: Spot Trap
Spot Trap.description: Notice the tripwire, the pressure plate, the too-obvious chest. Paranoia keeps you alive.

Find the Path.name: Find the Path
Find the Path.description: Let nature guide you - find the safest, fastest, or most hidden route through wilderness.

Guide Party.name: Guide Party
Guide Party.description: Lead a group safely through wilderness, helping less skilled travelers avoid hazards.

Scout Ahead.name: Scout Ahead
Scout Ahead.description: Move ahead of your group to identify dangers, opportunities, and optimal paths.

Mark the Trail.name: Mark the Trail
Mark the Trail.description: Leave subtle signs that allies can follow but enemies won't notice.

Shortcut.name: Shortcut
Shortcut.description: Find a faster route that others would miss - through the ravine, over the ridge, across the ford.

Safe Haven.name: Safe Haven
Safe Haven.description: Locate a defensible, concealed location for your party to rest or hide.

Navigate.name: Navigate
Navigate.description: Determine your location and bearing using sun, stars, landmarks, and instinct.

Terrain Report.name: Terrain Report
Terrain Report.description: Provide detailed tactical assessment of an area - cover, sight lines, approaches, hazards.

Two-Weapon Fighting.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
Two-Weapon Fighting.description: Wield a blade in each hand, striking with both in a flurry of steel.

Hatchet Work.name: Hatchet Work
Hatchet Work.description: Fight with the hand axe that's always at your belt - quick, brutal, practical.

Knife Fighter.name: Knife Fighter
Knife Fighter.description: Get inside their guard with a hunting knife - close, dirty, decisive.

Disengage.name: Disengage
Disengage.description: Break away from melee combat cleanly, creating distance to use your bow again.

Hamstring.name: Hamstring
Hamstring.description: Cut the tendons, cripple the legs. Your prey won't run far now.

Apex Predator.name: Apex Predator
Apex Predator.description: You are the top of the food chain. Everything else is prey. Hunt with absolute confidence and devastating skill.

Arrow of Slaying.name: Arrow of Slaying
Arrow of Slaying.description: Prepare and loose a single arrow imbued with all your hunter's knowledge of your prey. One shot to end it.

Master of the Wild.name: Master of the Wild
Master of the Wild.description: The wilderness is your home, your weapon, your ally. You can survive and thrive anywhere, track anything, and strike from any shadow.

Legend of the Hunt.name: Legend of the Hunt
Legend of the Hunt.description: Your reputation as a hunter is legendary. Prey fears you before they even know you're coming. Allies trust you absolutely in the wild.

Perfect Ambush.name: Perfect Ambush
Perfect Ambush.description: Set up the ideal ambush - terrain, concealment, timing, all aligned. When you spring it, nothing survives.

Soul Bond.name: Soul Bond
Soul Bond.description: Your bond with your companion transcends the physical. You see through their eyes, feel what they feel, fight as one being in two bodies.

Quick Fingers.name: Quick Fingers
Quick Fingers.description: Your hands move faster than the eye can track - palming, planting, or snatching in an instant.

Street Smarts.name: Street Smarts
Street Smarts.description: Read a situation instantly - who's dangerous, who's a mark, where the exits are.

Slippery.name: Slippery
Slippery.description: Twist free of grabs, slip out of holds, wriggle through tight spaces. You're hard to pin down.

Fade Into Shadow.name: Fade Into Shadow
Fade Into Shadow.description: Step into darkness and vanish completely. As long as there's shadow, there's concealment.

Silent Movement.name: Silent Movement
Silent Movement.description: Move without making a sound - no footfalls, no rustling, no breathing loud enough to hear.

Hide in Crowds.name: Hide in Crowds
Hide in Crowds.description: Disappear into a group of people, becoming just another face no one remembers.

Tail Someone.name: Tail Someone
Tail Someone.description: Follow a target through streets and crowds without being noticed.

Lose a Tail.name: Lose a Tail
Lose a Tail.description: Shake anyone following you through quick turns, doubles-back, and sudden vanishing.

Vanishing Act.name: Vanishing Act
Vanishing Act.description: Disappear in an instant - duck around a corner, drop through a window, and you're simply gone.

Unseen Presence.name: Unseen Presence
Unseen Presence.description: Move through occupied spaces without anyone realizing you're there - they look right past you.

Ghost.name: Ghost
Ghost.description: You were never here. No one saw you come, no one saw you go, no one remembers your face.

Cloak and Dagger.name: Cloak and Dagger
Cloak and Dagger.description: Move with your weapon drawn and ready to strike, yet still completely concealed.

Backstab.name: Backstab
Backstab.description: Strike from behind when they don't know you're there. The first blow is often the last.

Throat Cutter.name: Throat Cutter
Throat Cutter.description: Silence a target permanently before they can make a sound.

Kidney Shot.name: Kidney Shot
Kidney Shot.description: Drive your blade into the kidney - agonizing, debilitating, often lethal.

Ambush Strike.name: Ambush Strike
Ambush Strike.description: Attack from concealment with devastating force - all the patience pays off in one moment.

Exploit Opening.name: Exploit Opening
Exploit Opening.description: When an enemy is distracted, off-balance, or engaged with someone else - strike the exposed vulnerability.

Death From the Shadows.name: Death From the Shadows
Death From the Shadows.description: Strike, kill, and fade back into darkness before anyone knows what happened.

Assassinate.name: Assassinate
Assassinate.description: The perfect kill. Get close, strike once, walk away. They're dead before they hit the ground.

Vital Strike.name: Vital Strike
Vital Strike.description: Target the vulnerable points - arteries, organs, nerve clusters. Precise, lethal, efficient.

Lift Purse.name: Lift Purse
Lift Purse.description: Relieve someone of their coin purse without them noticing until you're long gone.

Plant Evidence.name: Plant Evidence
Plant Evidence.description: Slip something into someone's pocket or bag without them noticing - frame them nicely.

Steal Weapon.name: Steal Weapon
Steal Weapon.description: Lift a weapon right off someone's belt or out of their hand. They won't realize until they reach for it.

Snatch Keys.name: Snatch Keys
Snatch Keys.description: Take keys, badges, passes - anything that gets you through doors.

Work the Crowd.name: Work the Crowd
Work the Crowd.description: Move through a gathering, relieving multiple marks of their valuables in quick succession.

Switch Objects.name: Switch Objects
Switch Objects.description: Replace one thing with another without anyone noticing - the classic swap.

Master Thief.name: Master Thief
Master Thief.description: Take anything from anyone, no matter how well-guarded or closely held. If they have it, you can take it.

Pick Lock.name: Pick Lock
Pick Lock.description: Work a lock with your picks until it gives way. Patience and feel.

Quick Pick.name: Quick Pick
Quick Pick.description: Pop a lock in seconds - speed over finesse when time is short.

Defeat Mechanism.name: Defeat Mechanism
Defeat Mechanism.description: Bypass complex locking mechanisms - combination locks, puzzle locks, mechanical traps.

Crack Safe.name: Crack Safe
Crack Safe.description: Open secured containers through feel, sound, and patience. The good stuff is always locked up.

Nothing Stays Locked.name: Nothing Stays Locked
Nothing Stays Locked.description: You've never met a lock you couldn't beat. Given time, anything opens.

Tumble.name: Tumble
Tumble.description: Roll, flip, and twist to avoid attacks and get where you need to be.

Scale Wall.name: Scale Wall
Scale Wall.description: Climb surfaces that look impossible - finding handholds where none should exist.

Rooftop Runner.name: Rooftop Runner
Rooftop Runner.description: Sprint across rooftops, leaping gaps and vaulting obstacles with practiced ease.

Squeeze Through.name: Squeeze Through
Squeeze Through.description: Fit through spaces that seem too small - grates, gaps, narrow passages.

Escape Bonds.name: Escape Bonds
Escape Bonds.description: Slip out of ropes, chains, or manacles through flexibility and technique.

Dodge.name: Dodge
Dodge.description: Twist away from incoming attacks at the last moment - you weren't there when the blade arrived.

Death-Defying Leap.name: Death-Defying Leap
Death-Defying Leap.description: Jump gaps, drop heights, or launch yourself across distances that should kill you.

Evasion.name: Evasion
Evasion.description: Move so quickly you escape area effects entirely - dodge the fireball, slip the trap.

Uncatchable.name: Uncatchable
Uncatchable.description: You simply cannot be caught. No prison holds you, no pursuit catches you, no trap contains you.

Quick Exit.name: Quick Exit
Quick Exit.description: Spot and take the fastest route out of any situation - window, door, crowd, chaos.

Smooth Lie.name: Smooth Lie
Smooth Lie.description: Deliver a lie so naturally that even suspicious listeners believe it.

Fast Talk.name: Fast Talk
Fast Talk.description: Overwhelm someone with rapid-fire words until they agree just to make you stop.

Distraction.name: Distraction
Distraction.description: Create a commotion, draw attention, give someone something to look at that isn't you.

Disguise.name: Disguise
Disguise.description: Change your appearance convincingly - different clothes, different bearing, different person.

Assume Identity.name: Assume Identity
Assume Identity.description: Become someone else entirely - their mannerisms, their voice, their life.

Read Mark.name: Read Mark
Read Mark.description: Size up a potential victim - what they have, what they want, what they fear, how to play them.

Con Game.name: Con Game
Con Game.description: Run a scam - short con, long con, whatever it takes to separate a mark from their money.

Feign Innocence.name: Feign Innocence
Feign Innocence.description: Project complete harmlessness and confusion. Who, me? I just got here.

Bribe.name: Bribe
Bribe.description: Know exactly who can be bought and for how much. Everyone has a price.

Disarm Trap.name: Disarm Trap
Disarm Trap.description: Carefully disable a trap without setting it off. Steady hands, steady nerves.

Case the Joint.name: Case the Joint
Case the Joint.description: Scout a location thoroughly - entrances, exits, guards, valuables, security measures.

Spot the Tell.name: Spot the Tell
Spot the Tell.description: Notice the lie - the twitching eye, the nervous hand, the too-smooth delivery.

Find the Hidden.name: Find the Hidden
Find the Hidden.description: Locate secret compartments, hidden doors, concealed items. You know where people hide things.

Gather Intelligence.name: Gather Intelligence
Gather Intelligence.description: Work your contacts, listen at doors, piece together information from scraps.

Apply Poison.name: Apply Poison
Apply Poison.description: Coat a blade with poison quickly and safely, without poisoning yourself.

Poison the Drink.name: Poison the Drink
Poison the Drink.description: Slip something into someone's cup without being noticed. Classic, effective.

Sleeping Draught.name: Sleeping Draught
Sleeping Draught.description: Administer a concoction that puts the target into deep sleep - no mess, no noise.

Delayed Poison.name: Delayed Poison
Delayed Poison.description: Use a poison that takes hours or days to act - be long gone before they feel sick.

Paralyzing Agent.name: Paralyzing Agent
Paralyzing Agent.description: Deliver a poison that locks the muscles but leaves the mind aware. Useful for interrogation.

Deadly Toxin.name: Deadly Toxin
Deadly Toxin.description: Use a poison designed simply to kill - fast-acting, hard to treat, very effective.

Poison Resistance.name: Poison Resistance
Poison Resistance.description: Years of careful exposure have built up your tolerance. Most poisons barely affect you.

Sucker Punch.name: Sucker Punch
Sucker Punch.description: Hit them before they realize the fight has started.

Low Blow.name: Low Blow
Low Blow.description: Strike where it hurts most. Honor is for people who can afford to lose.

Pocket Sand.name: Pocket Sand
Pocket Sand.description: Throw dust, dirt, or grit in their eyes. Fight dirty, win cleanly.

Cheap Shot.name: Cheap Shot
Cheap Shot.description: Take advantage of any distraction or opening for a quick, painful strike.

Flank Strike.name: Flank Strike
Flank Strike.description: Circle around to attack from the side or rear while they're focused on someone else.

Feint.name: Feint
Feint.description: Fake an attack to draw their guard, then strike where they're exposed.

Blade Flurry.name: Blade Flurry
Blade Flurry.description: Unleash a rapid series of slashes and stabs, overwhelming defenses through sheer speed.

Fighting Retreat.name: Fighting Retreat
Fighting Retreat.description: Back away while keeping your blade between you and danger, ready to bolt.

Shiv.name: Shiv
Shiv.description: Attack with whatever sharp thing you have - broken bottle, sharpened spoon, glass shard.

Know the Streets.name: Know the Streets
Know the Streets.description: Navigate a city's layout instinctively - shortcuts, dangerous areas, safe houses, hidden paths.

Underworld Contacts.name: Underworld Contacts
