Underworld Contacts.description: Find and approach the local criminal element - fences, fixers, informants.

Find Black Market.name: Find Black Market
Find Black Market.description: Locate where stolen goods are sold and illegal services are bought.

Sewer Rat.name: Sewer Rat
Sewer Rat.description: Navigate the tunnels, sewers, and undercity. A whole world exists beneath the streets.

Rooftop Access.name: Rooftop Access
Rooftop Access.description: Find your way onto the rooftops and move across the city above street level.

Find Bolt Hole.name: Find Bolt Hole
Find Bolt Hole.description: Locate or remember a place to hide when heat comes down - you always have somewhere to go.

Criminal Reputation.name: Criminal Reputation
Criminal Reputation.description: Leverage your reputation in the underworld - respect, fear, or professional courtesy opens doors.

Perfect Heist.name: Perfect Heist
Perfect Heist.description: Plan and execute a flawless job. Get in, get the goods, get out. No traces, no witnesses, no problems.

Shadow Lord.name: Shadow Lord
Shadow Lord.description: You are one with the shadows. They hide you, shield you, transport you. Darkness is your ally and your home.

Death's Hand.name: Death's Hand
Death's Hand.description: You are the assassin that everyone fears but no one can find. Your kills are art, your escapes are legend.

Master of Disguise.name: Master of Disguise
Master of Disguise.description: You can become anyone. Any face, any voice, any life. Your true identity is just another mask.

Kingpin.name: Kingpin
Kingpin.description: You've built a network. Thieves, fences, informants, muscle - all answering to you. Crime is your business.

Untouchable.name: Untouchable
Untouchable.description: You cannot be caught, cornered, or killed. Every trap has an exit, every pursuit has an end, every blade misses. You always escape.

Nature's Tongue.name: Nature's Tongue
Nature's Tongue.description: Speak with animals and plants, understanding their simple thoughts and communicating your intent.

Feel the Land.name: Feel the Land
Feel the Land.description: Extend your senses through the earth and plants, feeling disturbances and presences in the area.

Primal Connection.name: Primal Connection
Primal Connection.description: Draw strength from the natural world around you, letting its vitality flow into your magic.

Wolf Form.name: Wolf Form
Wolf Form.description: Take the shape of a wolf - swift, tireless, with keen senses and pack instincts.

Bear Form.name: Bear Form
Bear Form.description: Become a bear - massive, powerful, able to absorb tremendous punishment and deal devastating blows.

Bird Form.name: Bird Form
Bird Form.description: Shift into a bird and take to the sky - hawk, owl, raven, or eagle.

Cat Form.name: Cat Form
Cat Form.description: Become a great cat - silent, agile, deadly. Perfect for stalking or swift escape.

Fish Form.name: Fish Form
Fish Form.description: Take aquatic form - swim with ease, breathe water, navigate currents.

Serpent Form.name: Serpent Form
Serpent Form.description: Become a snake - slip through cracks, sense heat, strike with venomous fangs.

Boar Form.name: Boar Form
Boar Form.description: Take the shape of a wild boar - tough hide, sharp tusks, unstoppable charge.

Spider Form.name: Spider Form
Spider Form.description: Become a spider - climb any surface, spin webs, sense vibrations through silk.

Dire Form.name: Dire Form
Dire Form.description: Take a monstrous animal shape - larger, more powerful, more savage than natural beasts.

Swarm Form.name: Swarm Form
Swarm Form.description: Dissolve into a swarm of insects or small creatures - nearly impossible to harm, able to flow through gaps.

Rapid Shift.name: Rapid Shift
Rapid Shift.description: Change forms instantly, flowing from one shape to another without pause.

Partial Shift.name: Partial Shift
Partial Shift.description: Transform only part of your body - grow claws, sprout wings, develop gills while remaining humanoid.

Hold Form.name: Hold Form
Hold Form.description: Maintain your animal shape through pain, magic, or conditions that would normally force you back.

Hybrid Form.name: Hybrid Form
Hybrid Form.description: Take a form between human and beast - standing upright with animal features, claws, and instincts.

Entangling Vines.name: Entangling Vines
Entangling Vines.description: Call vines and roots to erupt from the ground, grasping and restraining everything in an area.

Thorn Spray.name: Thorn Spray
Thorn Spray.description: Launch a burst of razor-sharp thorns at enemies, shredding flesh and embedding painfully.

Wall of Thorns.name: Wall of Thorns
Wall of Thorns.description: Raise a dense barrier of thorny growth - painful and dangerous to force through.

Barkskin.name: Barkskin
Barkskin.description: Harden your skin to the toughness of oak bark, turning aside blows that would cut flesh.

Goodberry.name: Goodberry
Goodberry.description: Infuse berries or seeds with nature's vitality, creating nourishing food that heals and sustains.

Speak with Plants.name: Speak with Plants
Speak with Plants.description: Commune with plant life, learning what they have witnessed and asking them to act.

Tree Stride.name: Tree Stride
Tree Stride.description: Step into one tree and emerge from another nearby, traveling through the living wood.

Grasping Roots.name: Grasping Roots
Grasping Roots.description: Command roots beneath the earth to burst up and drag a target down into the soil.

Verdant Explosion.name: Verdant Explosion
Verdant Explosion.description: Cause an eruption of plant growth - vines, thorns, and branches bursting outward in all directions.

Animate Plants.name: Animate Plants
Animate Plants.description: Awaken nearby plants to motion, commanding them to attack, restrain, or defend.

Speak with Animals.name: Speak with Animals
Speak with Animals.description: Communicate with beasts, understanding their thoughts and conveying your meaning.

Calm Beast.name: Calm Beast
Calm Beast.description: Soothe an aggressive or frightened animal, projecting calm and reassurance.

Animal Ally.name: Animal Ally
Animal Ally.description: Request aid from a nearby animal - ask it to scout, distract, attack, or assist.

Beast Senses.name: Beast Senses
Beast Senses.description: Borrow an animal's senses - see through a hawk's eyes, hear through a wolf's ears.

Feral Fury.name: Feral Fury
Feral Fury.description: Drive nearby animals into aggressive frenzy, turning them against your enemies.

Summon Beasts.name: Summon Beasts
Summon Beasts.description: Call animals from the surrounding area to fight at your side.

Dominate Beast.name: Dominate Beast
Dominate Beast.description: Seize control of an animal's will, commanding its actions directly.

Animal Messenger.name: Animal Messenger
Animal Messenger.description: Send a small animal to carry a message to a person or place you describe.

Call Lightning.name: Call Lightning
Call Lightning.description: Draw lightning from the sky to strike a target with thunderous force.

Gust of Wind.name: Gust of Wind
Gust of Wind.description: Summon a powerful wind to push back enemies, scatter projectiles, or clear fog.

Fog Bank.name: Fog Bank
Fog Bank.description: Call thick fog to roll in, obscuring vision and muffling sound.

Summon Rain.name: Summon Rain
Summon Rain.description: Bring rain to the area - from gentle drizzle to driving downpour.

Wind Wall.name: Wind Wall
Wind Wall.description: Create a barrier of swirling wind that deflects projectiles and impedes movement.

Thunderclap.name: Thunderclap
Thunderclap.description: Create a deafening crack of thunder that stuns and disorrients everyone nearby.

Earthquake.name: Earthquake
Earthquake.description: Shake the ground violently, cracking earth and toppling anything not firmly rooted.

Storm Call.name: Storm Call
Storm Call.description: Summon a raging storm with wind, rain, lightning, and thunder.

Wildfire.name: Wildfire
Wildfire.description: Ignite natural growth into spreading flames - fire as nature's renewal.

Flash Flood.name: Flash Flood
Flash Flood.description: Call water to surge through an area - from streams, rain, or underground sources.

Natural Healing.name: Natural Healing
Natural Healing.description: Channel nature's vitality to close wounds and ease pain.

Cure Poison.name: Cure Poison
Cure Poison.description: Draw poison from a body, neutralizing venom and toxins with natural antidotes.

Restoration.name: Restoration
Restoration.description: Restore health and vigor, healing injuries and curing natural ailments.

Rejuvenation.name: Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description: Infuse a person with nature's energy, speeding their natural healing dramatically.

Purge Corruption.name: Purge Corruption
Purge Corruption.description: Cleanse unnatural corruption, disease, or magical contamination from a living thing.

Regrowth.name: Regrowth
Regrowth.description: Accelerate natural healing to restore lost flesh, close terrible wounds, even regrow limbs given time.

Cleanse the Land.name: Cleanse the Land
Cleanse the Land.description: Purify a blighted or corrupted area, restoring natural balance and healthy growth.

Life Bloom.name: Life Bloom
Life Bloom.description: Channel a surge of life energy that heals everyone nearby - allies, animals, even plants.

Pass Without Trace.name: Pass Without Trace
Pass Without Trace.description: Move through natural terrain leaving no tracks, disturbing no growth, making no sound.

Shape Wood.name: Shape Wood
Shape Wood.description: Mold living or dead wood like clay - bending branches, forming tools, opening passages.

Stone Shape.name: Stone Shape
Stone Shape.description: Mold stone with your hands, forming it like soft clay.

Meld with Stone.name: Meld with Stone
Meld with Stone.description: Sink into stone, becoming one with it - hidden, protected, aware of vibrations through rock.

Create Grove.name: Create Grove
Create Grove.description: Cause rapid growth to create a small wooded area - shelter, concealment, sacred space.

Quicksand.name: Quicksand
Quicksand.description: Turn solid ground into a sucking trap that drags down anything standing on it.

Natural Camouflage.name: Natural Camouflage
Natural Camouflage.description: Blend yourself and others into the natural surroundings, becoming nearly invisible when still.

Read the Signs.name: Read the Signs
Read the Signs.description: Interpret natural omens - animal behavior, plant patterns, weather signs - to learn what's coming.

Ancient Knowledge.name: Ancient Knowledge
Ancient Knowledge.description: Draw on druidic lore passed down through generations - herbal uses, sacred sites, old bargains.

Identify Plant.name: Identify Plant
Identify Plant.description: Know any plant by sight - its uses, dangers, magical properties, and growing conditions.

Identify Beast.name: Identify Beast
Identify Beast.description: Recognize any animal - its nature, habits, dangers, and weaknesses.

Druidic Ritual.name: Druidic Ritual
Druidic Ritual.description: Perform an ancient druidic ceremony - to bless, consecrate, commune, or invoke natural power.

Commune with Nature.name: Commune with Nature
Commune with Nature.description: Enter deep meditation to learn about the surrounding land - creatures, terrain, water, plants, and disturbances.

Sacred Grove.name: Sacred Grove
Sacred Grove.description: Recognize and attune to a sacred natural place, drawing power from its ancient energy.

Nature's Armor.name: Nature's Armor
Nature's Armor.description: Call natural protection around you - bark, stone, ice, or chitin forming over your skin.

Thornshield.name: Thornshield
Thornshield.description: Surround yourself with sharp thorns that punish anyone who attacks you in melee.

Sanctuary of the Wild.name: Sanctuary of the Wild
Sanctuary of the Wild.description: Call upon nature to protect you - plants shield, animals guard, the land itself conceals.

Primal Ward.name: Primal Ward
Primal Ward.description: Create a ward against unnatural creatures - aberrations, undead, and constructs cannot easily approach.

One with Nature.name: One with Nature
One with Nature.description: Dissolve into the natural world around you - becoming grass, water, wind, untargetable and aware.

Archdruid.name: Archdruid
Archdruid.description: Embody the pinnacle of druidic power - shift forms instantly, command nature effortlessly, speak as the wild's voice.

Primal Avatar.name: Primal Avatar
Primal Avatar.description: Become an avatar of nature itself - part beast, part plant, part storm, utterly terrifying.

Wrath of Nature.name: Wrath of Nature
Wrath of Nature.description: Unleash the full fury of the natural world - earthquake, storm, and wild growth all at once.

Reincarnate.name: Reincarnate
Reincarnate.description: Return a dead soul to life in a new body grown from nature - different form, same spirit.

Nature's Champion.name: Nature's Champion
Nature's Champion.description: The wild recognizes you as its defender. Nature itself aids you - paths open, animals assist, plants shield.

Arcane Bolt.name: Arcane Bolt
Arcane Bolt.description: Launch a bolt of pure magical force - no element, just raw arcane energy.

Magical Focus.name: Magical Focus
Magical Focus.description: Center your concentration, improving the precision and power of your next spell.

Master Call of the Wild.name: Master Call of the Wild
Master Call of the Wild.description: Summon every animal within miles to your aid - a tide of beasts answering nature's call.

Fireball.name: Fireball
Fireball.description: Hurl a sphere of fire that explodes on impact, engulfing an area in flames.

Fire Lance.name: Fire Lance
Fire Lance.description: Project a focused beam of intense fire that punches through targets.

Flame Shield.name: Flame Shield
Flame Shield.description: Surround yourself with a barrier of fire that burns anything that comes too close.

Ignite.name: Ignite
Ignite.description: Set something ablaze with a gesture - a torch, a rope, an enemy's cloak.

Wall of Fire.name: Wall of Fire
Wall of Fire.description: Raise a curtain of flames that blocks passage and burns anything that tries to cross.

Incinerate.name: Incinerate
Incinerate.description: Pour intense heat into a single target, burning them from outside and within.

Firestorm.name: Firestorm
Firestorm.description: Rain fire from above across a wide area - devastating and indiscriminate.

Control Flames.name: Control Flames
Control Flames.description: Seize control of existing fire - expand it, shrink it, shape it, direct it elsewhere.

Delayed Blast.name: Delayed Blast
Delayed Blast.description: Create a fire spell that waits before detonating - a magical trap or timed explosion.

Ice Shard.name: Ice Shard
Ice Shard.description: Launch a spear of ice that pierces and chills the target.

Frost Cone.name: Frost Cone
Frost Cone.description: Blast a cone of freezing air that chills everything in its path.

Freeze.name: Freeze
Freeze.description: Encase a target in ice, immobilizing them in a frozen prison.

Ice Wall.name: Ice Wall
Ice Wall.description: Raise a barrier of solid ice - transparent, hard, and bitterly cold.

Blizzard.name: Blizzard
Blizzard.description: Summon a localized blizzard - driving snow, bitter cold, zero visibility.

Shatter.name: Shatter
Shatter.description: Hit a resonant frequency that shatters brittle objects and staggers creatures.

Ice Armor.name: Ice Armor
Ice Armor.description: Coat yourself in a layer of magical ice that absorbs damage and chills attackers.

Glacial Spike.name: Glacial Spike
Glacial Spike.description: Drive a massive spike of ice up from the ground, impaling and freezing.

Lightning Bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
Lightning Bolt.description: Hurl a crackling bolt of lightning that arcs toward your target.

Chain Lightning.name: Chain Lightning
Chain Lightning.description: Cast lightning that jumps from target to target, arcing between enemies.

Shocking Grasp.name: Shocking Grasp
Shocking Grasp.description: Channel electricity through your touch, jolting and stunning with contact.

Thunder Wave.name: Thunder Wave
Thunder Wave.description: Release a concussive blast of thunder that knocks back everything nearby.

Levitate.name: Levitate
Levitate.description: Rise into the air and hover, defying gravity through arcane manipulation.

Fly.name: Fly
Fly.description: Grant true flight - soar through the air with speed and maneuverability.

Static Field.name: Static Field
Static Field.description: Fill an area with crackling static that shocks anyone who moves through it.

Tempest.name: Tempest
Tempest.description: Unleash a devastating storm of wind, lightning, and thunder in a concentrated area.

Stone Bolt.name: Stone Bolt
Stone Bolt.description: Launch a dense chunk of stone with magical force, hitting like a cannonball.

Stone Skin.name: Stone Skin
Stone Skin.description: Harden your skin to the toughness of stone, turning aside blades and blows.

Wall of Stone.name: Wall of Stone
Wall of Stone.description: Raise a solid stone barrier from the ground - permanent, sturdy, and blocking.

Shatter Ground.name: Shatter Ground
Shatter Ground.description: Break the earth beneath enemies' feet, creating difficult, dangerous terrain.

Gravity Well.name: Gravity Well
Gravity Well.description: Create a point of intense gravity that pulls everything toward it.

Petrify.name: Petrify
Petrify.description: Begin turning a target to stone - slowing them as their flesh hardens.

Transmute Stone.name: Transmute Stone
Transmute Stone.description: Transform stone to mud or mud to stone - reshape terrain at will.

Meteor.name: Meteor
Meteor.description: Call down a massive stone from above, crushing everything where it lands.

Magic Missile.name: Magic Missile
Magic Missile.description: Launch darts of pure magical force that never miss their target.

Force Push.name: Force Push
Force Push.description: Slam a target with a wave of telekinetic force, shoving them back.

Shield.name: Shield
Shield.description: Raise an invisible barrier of force that blocks incoming attacks.

Force Cage.name: Force Cage
Force Cage.description: Trap a target in a cage of invisible force - no bars to slip through, no locks to pick.

Telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
Telekinesis.description: Move objects with your mind - lift, throw, manipulate without touching.

Disintegrate.name: Disintegrate
Disintegrate.description: Focus a beam of pure destructive energy that unmakes matter itself.

Force Wall.name: Force Wall
Force Wall.description: Create an invisible wall of force - transparent, impenetrable, immovable.

Arcane Explosion.name: Arcane Explosion
Arcane Explosion.description: Release a burst of raw magical energy in all directions.

Counterspell.name: Counterspell
Counterspell.description: Interrupt a spell being cast, unraveling it before it completes.

Dispel Magic.name: Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description: Unravel magical effects with a discordant note or words of negation.

Spell Reflection.name: Spell Reflection
Spell Reflection.description: Turn a spell back on its caster, using their power against them.

Anti-Magic Zone.name: Anti-Magic Zone
Anti-Magic Zone.description: Create an area where magic simply doesn't work - no spells, no enchantments, no magical effects.

Analyze Magic.name: Analyze Magic
Analyze Magic.description: Study a magical effect to understand its nature, power, and weaknesses.

Spell Theft.name: Spell Theft
Spell Theft.description: Seize control of another wizard's spell mid-flight, redirecting or claiming it.

Suppress Magic.name: Suppress Magic
Suppress Magic.description: Temporarily dampen magical effects in an area, weakening spells and enchantments.

Quicken Spell.name: Quicken Spell
Quicken Spell.description: Cast a spell faster than normal, compressing the gestures and incantations.

Empower Spell.name: Empower Spell
Empower Spell.description: Pour extra energy into a spell, dramatically increasing its power.

Extend Spell.name: Extend Spell
Extend Spell.description: Stretch a spell's duration far beyond normal limits.

Silent Spell.name: Silent Spell
Silent Spell.description: Cast without speaking, weaving magic through gesture alone.

Still Spell.name: Still Spell
Still Spell.description: Cast without moving, channeling magic through will alone.

Twin Spell.name: Twin Spell
Twin Spell.description: Cast the same spell twice simultaneously, hitting two targets.

Maximize Spell.name: Maximize Spell
Maximize Spell.description: Force a spell to achieve its absolute maximum effect.

Subtle Spell.name: Subtle Spell
Subtle Spell.description: Cast with no visible sign - no glow, no sound, no indication of magic.

Detect Magic.name: Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description: Sense the presence and location of magical effects, items, and creatures.

Identify.name: Identify
Identify.description: Determine the magical properties of an item, spell, or effect.

Comprehend Languages.name: Comprehend Languages
Comprehend Languages.description: Understand any language spoken or written - stories cross all barriers.

Message.name: Message
Message.description: Send a whispered message to someone you can see, heard only by them.

Mage Hand.name: Mage Hand
Mage Hand.description: Create a spectral hand that can manipulate objects at a distance.

Knock.name: Knock
Knock.description: Open a locked door with a word of power - locks click open at your command.

Locate Object.name: Locate Object
Locate Object.description: Sense the direction to a specific object you're familiar with.

Sending.name: Sending
Sending.description: Send a short message to anyone you know, anywhere - they can reply.

Feather Fall.name: Feather Fall
Feather Fall.description: Slow a fall with a quick incantation, landing gently instead of crashing.

Mage Armor.name: Mage Armor
Mage Armor.description: Wrap yourself in a protective field of magical force.

Mirror Image.name: Mirror Image
Mirror Image.description: Create illusory duplicates of yourself that confuse attackers.

Blink.name: Blink
Blink.description: Flicker between planes, becoming impossible to hit reliably.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: Bend light to render yourself or another unseen.

Globe of Invulnerability.name: Globe of Invulnerability
Globe of Invulnerability.description: Create a sphere that blocks incoming spells entirely.

Absorb Elements.name: Absorb Elements
Absorb Elements.description: Capture incoming elemental energy, reducing damage and storing power for your next spell.

Contingency.name: Contingency
Contingency.description: Set a spell to trigger automatically when specific conditions are met.

Dimension Door.name: Dimension Door
Dimension Door.description: Step through a brief portal to appear somewhere you can see or visualize.

Ward.name: Ward
Ward.description: Place a protective enchantment on a location that triggers when disturbed.

Alarm.name: Alarm
Alarm.description: Set a magical alarm that alerts you when something enters an area.

Magic Circle.name: Magic Circle
Magic Circle.description: Draw a circle of power that protects against specific creature types or contains summoned beings.

Glyph of Warding.name: Glyph of Warding
Glyph of Warding.description: Inscribe a magical trap that detonates when triggered.

Permanent Enchantment.name: Permanent Enchantment
Permanent Enchantment.description: Make a temporary magical effect permanent through extended ritual.

Binding Circle.name: Binding Circle
Binding Circle.description: Create a circle that holds summoned or extraplanar creatures prisoner.

Scribe Spell.name: Scribe Spell
Scribe Spell.description: Write a spell onto a scroll that can be cast later by anyone.

Arcane Lock.name: Arcane Lock
Arcane Lock.description: Seal a door or container with powerful magic that resists all normal opening.

Summon Elemental.name: Summon Elemental
Summon Elemental.description: Call an elemental being of fire, water, earth, or air to serve you.

Conjure Weapons.name: Conjure Weapons
Conjure Weapons.description: Create magical weapons that float and fight on their own.

Gate.name: Gate
Gate.description: Open a portal to another plane or distant location.

Planar Binding.name: Planar Binding
Planar Binding.description: Force a summoned creature into extended service through magical contract.

Minor Illusion.name: Minor Illusion
Minor Illusion.description: Create a small illusory sound or image - a distraction, a voice, a phantom shape.

Major Image.name: Major Image
Major Image.description: Create a convincing illusion with sight, sound, and smell.

Phantasmal Force.name: Phantasmal Force
Phantasmal Force.description: Create an illusion that exists only in one target's mind - completely real to them.

Disguise Self.name: Disguise Self
Disguise Self.description: Change your appearance through illusion - become someone else entirely.

Hallucinatory Terrain.name: Hallucinatory Terrain
Hallucinatory Terrain.description: Make terrain appear to be something else - hide a pit, create false walls, disguise a swamp as meadow.

Programmed Illusion.name: Programmed Illusion
Programmed Illusion.description: Create an illusion that activates under specific conditions and follows a script.

Illusory Reality.name: Illusory Reality
Illusory Reality.description: Make one element of an illusion temporarily real and solid.

Archmage.name: Archmage
Archmage.description: Embody the pinnacle of wizardly power - cast with perfect precision, counter any spell, reshape reality with a word.

Time Stop.name: Time Stop
Time Stop.description: Freeze time around you, acting freely while everyone else is frozen.

Wish.name: Wish
Wish.description: Speak a wish and bend reality to make it so. The ultimate expression of arcane power.

Meteor Swarm.name: Meteor Swarm
Meteor Swarm.description: Call down multiple massive meteors, devastating everything in a wide area.

Perfect Counterspell.name: Perfect Counterspell
Perfect Counterspell.description: Counter any spell automatically, no matter how powerful. Your understanding of magic is absolute.

Dark Bargain.name: Dark Bargain
Dark Bargain.description: Sacrifice something of yourself - blood, vitality, years - for a surge of immediate power.

Patron's Gift.name: Patron's Gift
Patron's Gift.description: Call upon your patron for direct aid - a surge of power, a moment of protection, a whispered secret.

Otherworldly Presence.name: Otherworldly Presence
Otherworldly Presence.description: Let your patron's nature bleed through you - an unsettling aura that marks you as touched by something beyond.

Invoke Pact.name: Invoke Pact
Invoke Pact.description: Remind your patron of the bargain between you, demanding the power you were promised.

Eldritch Sight.name: Eldritch Sight
Eldritch Sight.description: See through your patron's eyes - perceiving magic, lies, hidden things, and that which shouldn't be seen.

Agonizing Blast.name: Agonizing Blast
Agonizing Blast.description: Infuse your eldritch blast with pain - it doesn't just hit, it hurts.

Repelling Blast.name: Repelling Blast
Repelling Blast.description: Your eldritch blast carries tremendous force, hurling targets backward.

Eldritch Spear.name: Eldritch Spear
Eldritch Spear.description: Extend your blast to impossible range, striking targets far beyond normal reach.

Grasp of the Void.name: Grasp of the Void
Grasp of the Void.description: Your blast pulls targets toward you, dragging them through the air.

Chilling Blast.name: Chilling Blast
Chilling Blast.description: Infuse your blast with otherworldly cold that slows and numbs.

Eldritch Chain.name: Eldritch Chain
Eldritch Chain.description: Your blast arcs from target to target, striking multiple enemies.

Maddening Blast.name: Maddening Blast
Maddening Blast.description: Your blast carries whispers from beyond - targets hear things that shouldn't be heard.

Consuming Blast.name: Consuming Blast
Consuming Blast.description: Your blast feeds on what it hits, returning a portion of the damage as vitality to you.

Summon Pact Weapon.name: Summon Pact Weapon
Summon Pact Weapon.description: Call your patron-gifted weapon to your hand from nothing - it appears in a flash of eldritch light.

Thirsting Blade.name: Thirsting Blade
Thirsting Blade.description: Your pact weapon hungers for blood, striking with supernatural speed and ferocity.

Eldritch Smite.name: Eldritch Smite
Eldritch Smite.description: Channel eldritch energy through your pact weapon, adding devastating force to your strike.

Lifedrinker.name: Lifedrinker
Lifedrinker.description: Your pact weapon drains life from those it cuts, feeding their vitality to you.

Weapon Shift.name: Weapon Shift
Weapon Shift.description: Transform your pact weapon into a different form - sword becomes spear, axe becomes hammer.

Banishing Strike.name: Banishing Strike
Banishing Strike.description: Strike an enemy and briefly banish them to your patron's realm - they return moments later, shaken.

Shadow Blade.name: Shadow Blade
Shadow Blade.description: Your pact weapon becomes darkness itself - passing through armor, leaving wounds that don't bleed.

Summon Pact Familiar.name: Summon Pact Familiar
Summon Pact Familiar.description: Call forth your patron-granted familiar - an imp, quasit, sprite, or stranger thing.

Voice of the Chain.name: Voice of the Chain
Voice of the Chain.description: Speak through your familiar's mouth, see through its eyes, hear through its ears.

Familiar Attack.name: Familiar Attack
Familiar Attack.description: Command your familiar to attack - it strikes with supernatural viciousness.

Gift of the Chain.name: Gift of the Chain
Gift of the Chain.description: Your familiar can deliver touch spells for you, carrying your magic to targets you can't reach.

Protect Familiar.name: Protect Familiar
Protect Familiar.description: Shield your familiar from harm, redirecting damage meant for it onto yourself or into the void.

Chains of the Patron.name: Chains of the Patron
Chains of the Patron.description: Your familiar manifests chains of eldritch energy that bind and restrain your enemies.

Greater Familiar.name: Greater Familiar
Greater Familiar.description: Your familiar grows in power, becoming a more formidable creature.

Book of Shadows.name: Book of Shadows
Book of Shadows.description: Consult your patron-granted tome for eldritch secrets, gaining insight into the situation at hand.

Forbidden Lore.name: Forbidden Lore
Forbidden Lore.description: Access knowledge that mortals shouldn't have - your book reveals dark truths.

Eldritch Ritual.name: Eldritch Ritual
Eldritch Ritual.description: Perform a ritual from your book, achieving effects beyond normal spellcasting.

Steal Spell.name: Steal Spell
Steal Spell.description: Record a spell you witness into your book, adding it to your repertoire.

Words of Power.name: Words of Power
Words of Power.description: Speak words from your book that carry inherent power - reality responds to their utterance.

True Name.name: True Name
True Name.description: Your book reveals a creature's true name, giving you power over them.

Scribe Eldritch Sign.name: Scribe Eldritch Sign
Scribe Eldritch Sign.description: Draw a symbol from your book that holds power - a ward, a trap, or a mark of your patron.

Dissonant Whispers.name: Dissonant Whispers
Dissonant Whispers.description: Whisper a discordant melody that only your target hears - it claws at their mind.

Cause Fear.name: Cause Fear
Cause Fear.description: Project pure terror into a target's mind, overwhelming them with dread.

Mind Spike.name: Mind Spike
Mind Spike.description: Drive a spike of psychic energy into a target's mind, causing pain and disorientation.

Crown of Madness.name: Crown of Madness
Crown of Madness.description: Place a crown of jagged iron on a target's mind, driving them to attack their allies.

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description: Read surface thoughts and probe deeper for secrets - an invasion of the mind.

Phantasmal Killer.name: Phantasmal Killer
Phantasmal Killer.description: Reach into a target's mind and manifest their worst fear - visible only to them, but deadly real.

Dominate Person.name: Dominate Person
Dominate Person.description: Seize control of a target's mind, commanding their actions directly.

Howl of Pandemonium.name: Howl of Pandemonium
Howl of Pandemonium.description: Release a scream that carries the chaos of your patron's realm, driving everyone who hears it toward madness.

Blood Price.name: Blood Price
Blood Price.description: Cut yourself to fuel a surge of magical power - pain traded for strength.

Life Tap.name: Life Tap
Life Tap.description: Convert your own vitality into magical energy, spending health to cast.

Soul Burn.name: Soul Burn
Soul Burn.description: Push your magic beyond safe limits, burning your own essence for devastating power.

Desperate Plea.name: Desperate Plea
Desperate Plea.description: Call desperately to your patron - they may answer with more power, but they'll remember you owe them.

Offer the Fallen.name: Offer the Fallen
Offer the Fallen.description: Dedicate a defeated enemy to your patron, receiving power in exchange for the offering.

Dark Deal.name: Dark Deal
Dark Deal.description: Strike a deal in the moment - offer something to your patron for immediate aid. They always collect.

Darkness.name: Darkness
Darkness.description: Create an area of magical darkness that swallows all light.

Devil's Sight.name: Devil's Sight
Devil's Sight.description: See perfectly through any darkness, magical or natural - a gift from your patron.

Cloak of Shadows.name: Cloak of Shadows
Cloak of Shadows.description: Wrap yourself in darkness, becoming nearly invisible in dim light.

Hungering Dark.name: Hungering Dark
Hungering Dark.description: Your darkness becomes active and malevolent, draining life from those within it.

Shadow Conjuration.name: Shadow Conjuration
Shadow Conjuration.description: Shape shadows into semi-real objects or creatures that serve briefly.

Banish to Shadow.name: Banish to Shadow
Banish to Shadow.description: Send a target into the shadow plane - they return moments later, diminished by what they experienced.

Hellfire.name: Hellfire
Hellfire.description: Conjure flames from the lower planes - fire that burns the soul as well as the flesh.

Fiendish Resilience.name: Fiendish Resilience
Fiendish Resilience.description: Call on your patron's infernal nature to shrug off damage that would fell a mortal.

Dark One's Blessing.name: Dark One's Blessing
Dark One's Blessing.description: When you defeat an enemy, your patron rewards you with a surge of temporary vitality.

Hurl Through Hell.name: Hurl Through Hell
Hurl Through Hell.description: Briefly send a target through the lower planes - they return screaming, marked by the experience.

Infernal Calling.name: Infernal Calling
Infernal Calling.description: Summon a minor fiend to serve you briefly - it obeys, but it remembers.

Fey Presence.name: Fey Presence
Fey Presence.description: Project your patron's alien beauty or terror, charming or frightening everyone nearby.

Misty Escape.name: Misty Escape
Misty Escape.description: When harmed, turn to mist and reappear somewhere nearby - a gift from the fey.

Beguiling Influence.name: Beguiling Influence
Beguiling Influence.description: Channel your patron's supernatural charm, becoming impossibly persuasive.

Fey Step.name: Fey Step
Fey Step.description: Step briefly through the feywild, reappearing somewhere nearby in a shimmer of light.

Dark Delirium.name: Dark Delirium
Dark Delirium.description: Trap a target in a waking dream of your patron's realm - they see what you want them to see.

Awakened Mind.name: Awakened Mind
Awakened Mind.description: Communicate telepathically with any creature, regardless of language.

Entropic Ward.name: Entropic Ward
Entropic Ward.description: When attacked, briefly glimpse the future and twist fate to make them miss.

Thought Shield.name: Thought Shield
Thought Shield.description: Your mind is shielded against intrusion - your thoughts cannot be read, your dreams cannot be invaded.

Create Thrall.name: Create Thrall
Create Thrall.description: Touch someone's mind and leave a piece of your patron there - they become bound to you.

Alien Geometry.name: Alien Geometry
Alien Geometry.description: Briefly impose your patron's impossible geometry on reality - distances warp, angles don't add up.

Glimpse Beyond.name: Glimpse Beyond
Glimpse Beyond.description: Force a target to see what you see - a glimpse of your patron's true nature. Few minds survive unchanged.

Master of the Pact.name: Master of the Pact
Master of the Pact.description: Your connection to your patron is absolute - you channel their power as easily as breathing, demand their aid as equals.

Avatar of the Patron.name: Avatar of the Patron
Avatar of the Patron.description: Become a vessel for your patron's power - their nature manifests through you, overwhelming and terrible.

Eldritch Annihilation.name: Eldritch Annihilation
Eldritch Annihilation.description: Unleash the full destructive power your patron offers - a blast of otherworldly energy that devastates everything before you.

Soul Cage.name: Soul Cage
Soul Cage.description: Trap a dying creature's soul, holding it for questioning, sacrifice, or delivery to your patron.

Dark Apotheosis.name: Dark Apotheosis
Dark Apotheosis.description: Transcend mortality through your patron's power - briefly become something more than human, terrible and magnificent.

Rewrite the Pact.name: Rewrite the Pact
Rewrite the Pact.description: Renegotiate your bargain mid-conflict, trading something to your patron for immediate overwhelming power.

Bardic Inspiration.name: Bardic Inspiration
Bardic Inspiration.description: Inspire an ally with a few words or a musical flourish, filling them with confidence and capability.

Cutting Words.name: Cutting Words
Cutting Words.description: Undermine an enemy with a perfectly timed insult, distraction, or discordant note.

Song of Rest.name: Song of Rest
Song of Rest.description: Play a soothing melody that helps allies recover their strength and spirits during a rest.

Jack of All Trades.name: Jack of All Trades
Jack of All Trades.description: Draw on your broad experience - you know a little about everything, and it shows.

Performer's Flair.name: Performer's Flair
Performer's Flair.description: Add dramatic flourish to any action, making it more impressive and memorable.

Inspiring Words.name: Inspiring Words
Inspiring Words.description: Speak words of encouragement that fill an ally with renewed determination.

Combat Inspiration.name: Combat Inspiration
Combat Inspiration.description: Shout tactical encouragement that helps an ally strike true or dodge aside.

Font of Inspiration.name: Font of Inspiration
Font of Inspiration.description: Your inspiration flows freely - encourage multiple allies with a single performance.

Words of Hope.name: Words of Hope
Words of Hope.description: Speak words that kindle hope even in desperate situations, helping allies push through.

Steel the Mind.name: Steel the Mind
Steel the Mind.description: Strengthen an ally's resolve against fear, charm, or mental assault.

Mantle of Inspiration.name: Mantle of Inspiration
Mantle of Inspiration.description: Weave magic into your performance that physically moves allies into better positions.

Heroic Inspiration.name: Heroic Inspiration
Heroic Inspiration.description: Fill an ally with the spirit of legendary heroes - for a moment, they fight like champions of old.

Vicious Mockery.name: Vicious Mockery
Vicious Mockery.description: Hurl an insult so cutting it actually wounds - words that draw blood.

Taunt.name: Taunt
Taunt.description: Provoke an enemy with perfectly chosen words, drawing their attention and anger.

Confounding Words.name: Confounding Words
Confounding Words.description: Speak in contradictions and riddles that leave your target momentarily confused.

Discordant Strain.name: Discordant Strain
Discordant Strain.description: Play a note so wrong it disrupts concentration, breaking enemy spellcasting or focus.

Song of Discord.name: Song of Discord
Song of Discord.description: Sing a melody that breeds distrust and hostility among enemies, turning them against each other.

Cacophony.name: Cacophony
Cacophony.description: Create a burst of painful, disorienting noise that staggers everyone nearby.

Charm Person.name: Charm Person
Charm Person.description: Weave magic into your words that makes someone regard you as a trusted friend.

Enthrall.name: Enthrall
Enthrall.description: Capture an audience's complete attention with your performance - they can't look away.

Suggestion.name: Suggestion
Suggestion.description: Plant an idea in someone's mind that seems reasonable - they'll follow through unless it harms them.

Mantle of Majesty.name: Mantle of Majesty
Mantle of Majesty.description: Cloak yourself in supernatural authority - your commands carry the weight of royalty.

Mass Suggestion.name: Mass Suggestion
Mass Suggestion.description: Plant the same suggestion in multiple minds at once - crowds move at your word.

Irresistible Dance.name: Irresistible Dance
Irresistible Dance.description: Play a tune so infectious your target cannot help but dance, unable to stop or fight effectively.

Glibness.name: Glibness
Glibness.description: Your words become supernaturally convincing - even obvious lies sound like truth.

Stirring Performance.name: Stirring Performance
Stirring Performance.description: Deliver a performance that moves your audience emotionally, creating the response you desire.

Countersong.name: Countersong
Countersong.description: Play music that disrupts magical effects based on sound or speech.

Dirge.name: Dirge
Dirge.description: Sing a mournful song that saps the will to fight from those who hear it.

Battle Hymn.name: Battle Hymn
Battle Hymn.description: Sing a rousing war song that fills allies with fighting spirit and coordination.

Lullaby.name: Lullaby
Lullaby.description: Sing a gentle melody that lulls listeners toward sleep and drowsiness.

Song of Speed.name: Song of Speed
Song of Speed.description: Play a rapid, driving rhythm that quickens allies' movements and reactions.

Song of Valor.name: Song of Valor
Song of Valor.description: Sing of legendary heroes, filling allies with their courage and skill.

Song of Healing.name: Song of Healing
Song of Healing.description: Play a restorative melody that mends wounds and eases pain.

Sonic Blast.name: Sonic Blast
Sonic Blast.description: Channel pure sound into a weapon - a note that hits like a physical blow.

Bardic Knowledge.name: Bardic Knowledge
Bardic Knowledge.description: Recall a relevant legend, song, or story - bards know a little about everything.

Identify Monster.name: Identify Monster
Identify Monster.description: Recognize a creature from stories and songs - its nature, weaknesses, and dangers.

Legend Lore.name: Legend Lore
Legend Lore.description: Recall or piece together legends about a person, place, or object of significance.

Know the Story.name: Know the Story
Know the Story.description: Recognize patterns in events - you've heard this story before, and you know how it goes.

Tongues.name: Tongues
Tongues.description: Speak any language fluently - your words reach everyone.

Magical Secrets.name: Magical Secrets
Magical Secrets.description: Draw on forbidden or forgotten magical knowledge - bards collect secrets from everywhere.

Silent Image.name: Silent Image
Silent Image.description: Create a visual illusion that moves and changes as you direct.

Seeming.name: Seeming
Seeming.description: Disguise an entire group - everyone looks like someone else.

Mislead.name: Mislead
Mislead.description: Become invisible while leaving behind an illusory double that acts as you direct.

Blade Flourish.name: Blade Flourish
Blade Flourish.description: Add a flashy weapon maneuver to your attack - style and substance together.

Defensive Flourish.name: Defensive Flourish
Defensive Flourish.description: Spin your blade in a defensive pattern that protects as it strikes.

Mobile Flourish.name: Mobile Flourish
Mobile Flourish.description: Strike and spin away in one fluid motion, repositioning as you attack.

Slashing Flourish.name: Slashing Flourish
Slashing Flourish.description: Sweep your blade in a wide arc that threatens everyone nearby.

Dueling Performance.name: Dueling Performance
Dueling Performance.description: Turn a one-on-one fight into a performance, dazzling onlookers while outmatching your opponent.

Master Duelist.name: Master Duelist
Master Duelist.description: Fight with the skill of a legendary blade-dancer - every move is perfect, every strike a statement.

Psychic Blades.name: Psychic Blades
Psychic Blades.description: Channel psychic energy through your weapon, striking at mind as well as body.

Words of Terror.name: Words of Terror
Words of Terror.description: Speak privately with someone and leave them terrified of you - or of something you describe.

Mantle of Whispers.name: Mantle of Whispers
Mantle of Whispers.description: Capture a dying creature's shadow, letting you assume their appearance and access their surface memories.

Shadow Lore.name: Shadow Lore
Shadow Lore.description: Plant magical suggestions so deep the target believes they were their own ideas.

Extract Information.name: Extract Information
Extract Information.description: Draw secrets from someone through seemingly innocent conversation.

Venomous Words.name: Venomous Words
Venomous Words.description: Speak words that poison relationships - turn allies against each other with carefully placed lies.

Locate Creature.name: Locate Creature
Locate Creature.description: Sense the direction to a specific creature you're seeking.

Teleportation Circle.name: Teleportation Circle
Teleportation Circle.description: Create a portal to a permanent teleportation circle you know.

Master Performer.name: Master Performer
Master Performer.description: Your performances achieve legendary status - crowds weep, armies hesitate, reality bends to your art.

Words of Creation.name: Words of Creation
Words of Creation.description: Speak the primal words that shaped reality - your voice carries the power of creation itself.

Song of Victory.name: Song of Victory
Song of Victory.description: Sing a song so powerful it turns the tide of any battle - allies fight like heroes, enemies lose heart.

Power Word Kill.name: Power Word Kill
Power Word Kill.description: Speak a single word of such power that a weakened enemy simply dies.

Tale of the Immortals.name: Tale of the Immortals
Tale of the Immortals.description: Tell a story so compelling that its subjects become part of legend - temporarily gaining legendary abilities.

Flurry of Blows.name: Flurry of Blows
Flurry of Blows.description: Unleash a rapid series of strikes - fists, elbows, knees, kicks in fluid combination.

Ki Strike.name: Ki Strike
Ki Strike.description: Channel your inner energy into a single devastating blow that strikes harder than steel.

Deflect Missile.name: Deflect Missile
Deflect Missile.description: Snatch an incoming projectile from the air or knock it aside with a precise strike.

Unarmored Defense.name: Unarmored Defense
Unarmored Defense.description: Move with such fluid awareness that attacks simply miss - no armor needed.

Centered Breath.name: Centered Breath
Centered Breath.description: Take a centering breath that restores focus and calms the mind.

Martial Arts.name: Martial Arts
Martial Arts.description: Apply your training to any unarmed situation - your body is always armed.

Palm Strike.name: Palm Strike
Palm Strike.description: Drive your palm into a target with bone-jarring force, striking through armor.

Spinning Kick.name: Spinning Kick
Spinning Kick.description: Whirl into a powerful kick that builds momentum from the rotation.

Elbow Strike.name: Elbow Strike
Elbow Strike.description: Drive your elbow into a target at close range - devastating in a clinch.

Knee Strike.name: Knee Strike
Knee Strike.description: Bring your knee up into a target with crushing force.

Flying Kick.name: Flying Kick
Flying Kick.description: Launch yourself through the air with a devastating leaping kick.

Sweeping Kick.name: Sweeping Kick
Sweeping Kick.description: Sweep your leg low to knock opponents off their feet.

Rapid Strikes.name: Rapid Strikes
Rapid Strikes.description: Throw a blinding barrage of punches faster than the eye can follow.

Combination Strike.name: Combination Strike
Combination Strike.description: Flow from one strike into another - punch, kick, elbow, knee in seamless sequence.

Tiger Claw.name: Tiger Claw
Tiger Claw.description: Strike with fingers curved like claws, raking and tearing.

Crane Kick.name: Crane Kick
Crane Kick.description: Balance on one leg and strike with perfect precision - a technique of patience and timing.

Dragon Strike.name: Dragon Strike
Dragon Strike.description: A lunging strike that covers distance and hits with your full body weight behind it.

Ki Focus.name: Ki Focus
Ki Focus.description: Center your ki, drawing power inward for your next action.

Ki Shout.name: Ki Shout
Ki Shout.description: Release your ki in a focused shout that staggers nearby enemies.

Ki Push.name: Ki Push
Ki Push.description: Project your ki outward in a wave of force that shoves targets back.

Ki Barrier.name: Ki Barrier
Ki Barrier.description: Harden your ki into an invisible barrier that deflects incoming attacks.

Ki Healing.name: Ki Healing
Ki Healing.description: Direct your life energy to mend your own wounds, accelerating natural healing.

Transfer Ki.name: Transfer Ki
Transfer Ki.description: Share your life energy with another, healing their wounds at cost to yourself.

Ki Empowerment.name: Ki Empowerment
Ki Empowerment.description: Flood your muscles with ki, granting supernatural strength for a moment.

Ki Sight.name: Ki Sight
Ki Sight.description: Sense the life energy of nearby creatures - see through darkness, detect the hidden.

Empty Body.name: Empty Body
Empty Body.description: Become so attuned to your ki that you can briefly turn invisible or ethereal.

Ki Projection.name: Ki Projection
Ki Projection.description: Project your ki as a ranged attack - a bolt of pure life force.

Ki Wave.name: Ki Wave
Ki Wave.description: Release your ki in an expanding wave that strikes everything around you.

Stunning Strike.name: Stunning Strike
Stunning Strike.description: Strike a pressure point that sends a shock through the nervous system, stunning the target.

Nerve Strike.name: Nerve Strike
Nerve Strike.description: Hit a nerve cluster that causes intense pain and temporary weakness.

Numbing Strike.name: Numbing Strike
Numbing Strike.description: Strike a point that deadens feeling in a limb, making it useless.

Paralyzing Touch.name: Paralyzing Touch
Paralyzing Touch.description: Strike multiple pressure points in rapid sequence, temporarily paralyzing the target.

Silencing Strike.name: Silencing Strike
Silencing Strike.description: Strike the throat precisely, preventing speech and spellcasting.

Blinding Strike.name: Blinding Strike
Blinding Strike.description: Strike at the eyes or temples, causing temporary blindness.

Quivering Palm.name: Quivering Palm
Quivering Palm.description: Touch an enemy and set vibrations in their body that you can release later with devastating effect.

Step of the Wind.name: Step of the Wind
Step of the Wind.description: Move with supernatural speed and lightness, dashing or leaping beyond normal limits.

Slow Fall.name: Slow Fall
Slow Fall.description: Use your ki to reduce falling damage, landing safely from great heights.

Wall Run.name: Wall Run
Wall Run.description: Sprint along vertical surfaces, defying gravity through momentum and ki.

Water Walk.name: Water Walk
Water Walk.description: Move across water as if it were solid ground, so light and fast you don't break the surface.

Evasive Movement.name: Evasive Movement
Evasive Movement.description: Weave through a dangerous area, avoiding attacks and obstacles with fluid motion.

Flowing Dodge.name: Flowing Dodge
Flowing Dodge.description: Bend and twist around attacks with liquid grace, never stopping your movement.

Lightning Step.name: Lightning Step
Lightning Step.description: Move to a nearby location so fast observers see only a blur.

Unimpeded Movement.name: Unimpeded Movement
Unimpeded Movement.description: Move through difficult terrain, crowds, or obstacles without slowing.

Deflect Attack.name: Deflect Attack
Deflect Attack.description: Redirect an incoming melee attack with a precise parry or body shift.

Catch Blade.name: Catch Blade
Catch Blade.description: Catch an incoming blade between your palms, stopping the strike cold.

Redirect Force.name: Redirect Force
Redirect Force.description: Turn an attacker's momentum against them, sending their strike elsewhere.

Return Missile.name: Return Missile
Return Missile.description: Catch a projectile and hurl it back at the attacker in one motion.

Iron Skin.name: Iron Skin
Iron Skin.description: Harden your body through ki concentration, shrugging off blows that would fell others.

Diamond Soul.name: Diamond Soul
Diamond Soul.description: Your ki shields you from magical effects, granting resistance to spells.

Perfect Defense.name: Perfect Defense
Perfect Defense.description: Enter a defensive stance so refined that attacks simply cannot reach you.

Still Mind.name: Still Mind
Still Mind.description: Center yourself against mental intrusion - your thoughts are your own.

Purity of Body.name: Purity of Body
Purity of Body.description: Your trained body resists disease, poison, and physical corruption.

Clarity.name: Clarity
Clarity.description: Cut through confusion, illusion, or mental fog with pure focused will.

Iron Will.name: Iron Will
Iron Will.description: Resist charm, fear, or compulsion through sheer mental discipline.

Tranquility.name: Tranquility
Tranquility.description: Enter a state of perfect calm that cannot be disrupted by pain, fear, or provocation.

Focused Mind.name: Focused Mind
Focused Mind.description: Concentrate so completely that distractions cease to exist.

Resist Domination.name: Resist Domination
Resist Domination.description: Break free from magical control through pure will and self-possession.

Timeless Body.name: Timeless Body
Timeless Body.description: Your body no longer ages normally - you resist the effects of time and exhaustion.

Grapple.name: Grapple
Grapple.description: Seize an opponent and control their movement through holds and leverage.

Throw.name: Throw
Throw.description: Use an opponent's momentum to send them flying.

Joint Lock.name: Joint Lock
Joint Lock.description: Twist a limb into a painful lock that immobilizes or forces compliance.

Choke Hold.name: Choke Hold
Choke Hold.description: Cut off an opponent's air or blood flow, rendering them unconscious.

Suplex.name: Suplex
Suplex.description: Lift an opponent and drive them headfirst into the ground.

Pin.name: Pin
Pin.description: Force an opponent to the ground and hold them there immobilized.

Counter Throw.name: Counter Throw
Counter Throw.description: Use an opponent's grapple attempt against them, throwing them instead.

Break Hold.name: Break Hold
Break Hold.description: Escape from any grapple or restraint through technique and flexibility.

Fist of Fire.name: Fist of Fire
Fist of Fire.description: Channel ki into a strike that burns with intense heat.

Fist of Ice.name: Fist of Ice
Fist of Ice.description: Channel ki into a strike that chills and numbs.

Fist of Thunder.name: Fist of Thunder
Fist of Thunder.description: Channel ki into a strike that crackles with lightning.

Fist of Stone.name: Fist of Stone
Fist of Stone.description: Channel ki into a strike that hits with the weight of a boulder.

Elemental Attunement.name: Elemental Attunement
Elemental Attunement.description: Attune your ki to an element, gaining minor control over it - snuff flames, stir wind, move water.

Opportunist.name: Opportunist
Opportunist.description: Strike when enemies are distracted or engaged with others - perfect timing.

Sun Soul Blast.name: Sun Soul Blast
Sun Soul Blast.description: Project a bolt of radiant energy from your palm - light made into a weapon.

Searing Arc.name: Searing Arc
Searing Arc.description: Sweep a beam of radiant energy in an arc, burning everything it touches.

Drunken Sway.name: Drunken Sway
Drunken Sway.description: Move unpredictably, swaying and stumbling in a way that's actually perfectly controlled.

Tipsy Sway.name: Tipsy Sway
Tipsy Sway.description: Redirect an attack meant for you to hit someone else nearby.

Long Death Gaze.name: Long Death Gaze
Long Death Gaze.description: Fix your gaze on someone and let them see their own death - pure terror.

Touch of Death.name: Touch of Death
Touch of Death.description: Channel negative ki into a touch that withers life force.

Perfect Self.name: Perfect Self
Perfect Self.description: Achieve a state of physical and spiritual perfection - your body, mind, and ki in absolute harmony.

Thousand Fists.name: Thousand Fists
Thousand Fists.description: Unleash a barrage of strikes so fast and numerous they seem to hit everywhere at once.

One with Everything.name: One with Everything
One with Everything.description: Your ki merges with the world around you - you sense everything, move through anything, strike from anywhere.

Death Touch.name: Death Touch
Death Touch.description: Strike once with perfect precision, channeling lethal ki directly into a target's life force.

Ascendant Form.name: Ascendant Form
Ascendant Form.description: Transcend physical limitations entirely - become something beyond mortal for a brief time.

Grandmaster.name: Grandmaster
Grandmaster.description: You have mastered every technique, every form, every secret. Your martial arts are without flaw.

Crimson Cut.name: Crimson Cut
Crimson Cut.description: A blade strike infused with blood magic - the wound bleeds more than it should, the pain sharper than the cut.

Blood Step.name: Blood Step
Blood Step.description: Move with supernatural grace, your blood singing with power as you flow through combat.

Sanguine Shield.name: Sanguine Shield
Sanguine Shield.description: Draw blood from a small self-inflicted cut to form a momentary barrier of crimson energy.

Ritual Stance.name: Ritual Stance
Ritual Stance.description: Enter a fighting stance that treats every movement as part of a blood ritual.

Blood Sense.name: Blood Sense
Blood Sense.description: Feel the pulse of nearby living creatures through the blood in your veins.

Blade Dance.name: Blade Dance
Blade Dance.description: Flow through a series of strikes and spins, your blade tracing deadly arcs.

Whirling Cuts.name: Whirling Cuts
Whirling Cuts.description: Spin through enemies, blade extended, cutting everything within reach.

Pirouette Strike.name: Pirouette Strike
Pirouette Strike.description: Spin on one foot and strike with centrifugal force behind the blade.

Crimson Waltz.name: Crimson Waltz
Crimson Waltz.description: Dance through a group of enemies, cutting each in turn without breaking rhythm.

Leaping Slash.name: Leaping Slash
Leaping Slash.description: Spring into the air and descend with blade leading, momentum adding force.

Death Spiral.name: Death Spiral
Death Spiral.description: Enter a spinning descent of blades, becoming a whirlwind of cuts.

Razor Flourish.name: Razor Flourish
Razor Flourish.description: Perform a showy blade flourish that's actually a rapid series of cuts.

Twin Fang.name: Twin Fang
Twin Fang.description: Strike with two blades simultaneously from opposite angles.

Serpentine Movement.name: Serpentine Movement
Serpentine Movement.description: Weave through combat with sinuous, unpredictable motion.

Offering Cut.name: Offering Cut
Offering Cut.description: Make a ritual cut on your own flesh, releasing blood magic into your next action.

Vital Surge.name: Vital Surge
Vital Surge.description: Burn your own life force for a burst of speed and strength.

Scarlet Empowerment.name: Scarlet Empowerment
Scarlet Empowerment.description: Let blood flow freely from self-inflicted wounds, dramatically empowering your magic.

Pain as Fuel.name: Pain as Fuel
Pain as Fuel.description: Transform the pain of your wounds into magical energy.

Desperate Sacrifice.name: Desperate Sacrifice
Desperate Sacrifice.description: Make a dangerous sacrifice of your own vitality for overwhelming power.

Scar Memory.name: Scar Memory
Scar Memory.description: Reopen old ritual scars, releasing the power stored within them.

Blood Draw.name: Blood Draw
Blood Draw.description: Pull blood from a wound you've inflicted, drawing it toward you.

Siphon Life.name: Siphon Life
Siphon Life.description: Drain life force from an enemy through a bleeding wound, healing yourself.

Vampiric Strike.name: Vampiric Strike
Vampiric Strike.description: A blade strike that steals vitality - your wounds close as theirs open.

Exsanguinate.name: Exsanguinate
Exsanguinate.description: Cause a wound to bleed catastrophically, draining the target rapidly.

Blood Feast.name: Blood Feast
Blood Feast.description: Drain multiple bleeding enemies at once, feasting on their spilled blood.

Consume Vitality.name: Consume Vitality
Consume Vitality.description: Rip life force directly from a target, leaving them weakened and drained.

Drink Deep.name: Drink Deep
Drink Deep.description: Draw heavily on spilled blood, rapidly restoring your own vitality.

Shield Bash.name: Shield Bash
Shield Bash.description: Strike with your shield edge-on, staggering your opponent and creating an opening.

Anvil Stance.name: Anvil Stance
Anvil Stance.description: Plant your feet and become nearly impossible to move, absorbing force like a struck anvil before answering in kind.

Forge Temper.name: Forge Temper
Forge Temper.description: Draw on the discipline of the forge, hardening your resolve against fear, pain, heat, and exhaustion.

Clan Hammer Oath.name: Clan Hammer Oath
Clan Hammer Oath.description: Swear aloud by forge, bloodline, and stone. Your next blow carries the pride and fury of your clan.

Armor Cracker.name: Armor Cracker
Armor Cracker.description: Drive your warhammer into armor, shields, or thick hide, denting protection and opening the target to follow-up attacks.

Ringing Blow.name: Ringing Blow
Ringing Blow.description: Strike with a concussive impact that leaves the target staggered, ears ringing, and balance broken.

Breaker Swing.name: Breaker Swing
Breaker Swing.description: Put your whole body behind a brutal hammer swing designed to smash doors, shields, bones, or enemy formations.

Stonebell Impact.name: Stonebell Impact
Stonebell Impact.description: Strike the ground or a hard surface so perfectly the impact rings through stone, staggering nearby enemies.

Siegebreaker.name: Siegebreaker
Siegebreaker.description: Attack a barrier, gate, armored foe, or fortified position as if you were a one-dwarf siege engine.

Patchwork Fix.name: Patchwork Fix
Patchwork Fix.description: Repair a damaged object, weapon, trap, or mechanism with whatever parts are available. It works, though elegance is not guaranteed.

Pocket Contraption.name: Pocket Contraption
Pocket Contraption.description: Assemble a small one-use device for the moment: a spark thrower, clamp, pulley, noise-maker, smoke popper, or other simple tool.

Spring Trap.name: Spring Trap
Spring Trap.description: Quickly rig a mechanical trap from wire, springs, weights, and spite. It can trip, snare, distract, or painfully surprise a target.

Clockwork Assistant.name: Clockwork Assistant
Clockwork Assistant.description: Deploy a tiny temporary helper device to hold a tool, carry a small item, scout a few steps ahead, or create a useful distraction.

Overclock.name: Overclock
Overclock.description: Push a device, weapon, lockpick, tool, or mechanism past its safe limits for a burst of extra performance. It may not survive the attempt.

Sabotage Mechanism.name: Sabotage Mechanism
Sabotage Mechanism.description: Disable, jam, weaken, or booby-trap a machine, lock, weapon, armor joint, door, cart, lift, or other mechanical system.

Improvised Launcher.name: Improvised Launcher
Improvised Launcher.description: Build or modify a crude launcher that hurls bolts, stones, vials, scrap, rope, or whatever else seems like a terrible idea at high speed.

Masterwork Improvisation.name: Masterwork Improvisation
Masterwork Improvisation.description: Create a surprisingly elegant temporary machine from scrap, tools, and battlefield debris. For one scene, it works almost like it was planned.

acrobatics.name: acrobatics
acrobatics.description: Perform acrobatic maneuvers such as flips, somersaults and tumbles.

athletics.name: athletics
athletics.description: Perform feats of running, jumping, climbing, and other physical challenges.

intimidation.name: intimidation
intimidation.description: Strike fear into others to sway the outcome of confrontations.

investigation.name: investigation
investigation.description: Find clues and uncover hidden information through careful observation.

performance.name: performance
performance.description: Entertain others with dancing, singing, jokes, acting or other performing arts.

persuasion.name: persuasion
persuasion.description: Influence others through speech and gesture.

survival.name: survival
survival.description: Forage for food and water and build makeshift shelters.

shape shifting.name: shape shifting
shape shifting.description: Magically shapeshift into animal form and fight while transformed.

air magic.name: air magic
air magic.description: Magically command the element of air

alchemy.name: alchemy
alchemy.description: Make potions and other alchemical substances

animal handling.name: animal handling
animal handling.description: Communicate with, train and give commands to animals.

blood magic.name: blood magic
blood magic.description: Magically command the element of blood.

dagger.name: dagger
dagger.description: Fight with daggers and other short blades.

dark magic.name: dark magic
dark magic.description: Wield forbidden powers drawn from shadow, decay, and malevolent forces to curse enemies, drain life, and corrupt the natural order. This dangerous magic exacts a toll on those who use it but offers devastating power.

divination magic.name: divination magic
divination magic.description: Magically foresee future events and uncover hidden information.

earth magic.name: earth magic
earth magic.description: Magically command the element of earth.

fire magic.name: fire magic
fire magic.description: Magically command the element of fire.

hunting.name: hunting
hunting.description: Track and hunt animals and people.

leadership.name: leadership
leadership.description: Lead others, in and out of combat.

divine magic.name: divine magic
divine magic.description: Channel spiritual power to smite foes with radiant energy, turn undead, ward against evil, and fortify the spirit through blessing and consecration.

lockpicking.name: lockpicking
lockpicking.description: Pick locks, using tools to open locked doors and containers without having the key.

lore.name: lore
lore.description: Theoretical knowledge of history, magic, culture, and the natural world.

medicine.name: medicine
medicine.description: Diagnose and treat injuries and diseases, as well as perform basic surgical procedures.

nature magic.name: nature magic
nature magic.description: Magically command natural growth and decay, commune with beasts, and channel the primal forces of wilderness.

necromancy magic.name: necromancy magic
necromancy magic.description: Magically communicate with and reanimate the dead, as well as summon and command undead beings.

healing magic.name: healing magic
healing magic.description: Restore living tissue, close wounds, regenerate limbs, and cure poisons through restorative magic.

riding.name: riding
riding.description: Ride horses and other mounts, in and out of combat.

enchanting magic.name: enchanting magic
enchanting magic.description: Magically enhance inanimate objects with arcane properties.

ritual magic.name: ritual magic
ritual magic.description: Cast spells that require lengthy, complex preparation and execution.

pickpocketing.name: pickpocketing
pickpocketing.description: Pick pockets and perform slight of hand through manual dexterity.

stealth.name: stealth
stealth.description: Evade detection by hiding and sneaking.

tactics.name: tactics
tactics.description: Coordinate with others in combat and identify enemies' strengths and weaknesses.

throwing.name: throwing
throwing.description: Throw small objects, in and out of combat.

water magic.name: water magic
water magic.description: Magically command the element of water.

cooking.name: cooking
cooking.description: Prepare food and cook meals from ingredients.

smithing.name: smithing
smithing.description: Forge and repair metal weapons, armor, and tools.

carpentry.name: carpentry
carpentry.description: Build and repair wooden structures, furniture, and simple wooden items.

leatherworking.name: leatherworking
leatherworking.description: Craft and repair leather armor, bags, boots, and other leather goods.

tailoring.name: tailoring
tailoring.description: Sew and repair clothing, cloth armor, and fabric goods.

psionics.name: psionics
psionics.description: Magically manipulating the mind, matter, or energy through thought alone.

blunt weapons.name: blunt weapons
blunt weapons.description: Fight with a mace, club, hammer or other bludgeoning weapon.

telepathy.name: telepathy
telepathy.description: Read surface thoughts, send mental messages, and sense emotions.

telekinesis.name: telekinesis
telekinesis.description: Move and manipulate objects through mental force alone.

engineering.name: engineering
engineering.description: Knowledge of mechanical principles, structural design, and the construction of complex devices. Encompasses everything from siege engines and fortifications to clever mechanisms, water systems, and ingenious contraptions.

shield.name: shield
shield.description: Fight defensively with shields, blocking incoming attacks and protecting allies. Can use shields to bash enemies in close combat.

lightning magic.name: lightning magic
lightning magic.description: Magically command the raw power of lightning and storms to strike foes. Wielders can focus this energy for precise shocks or unleash devastating arcs of lightning.

ice magic.name: ice magic
ice magic.description: Magically command the element of ice to freeze foes and create barriers. Wielders can conjure biting frosts or shape solid structures from thin air.

warhammer.name: warhammer
warhammer.description: Fight with heavy blunt weapons designed to crush armor and bone. This skill allows for powerful overhead strikes and defensive counters.

league_join_recognized.name: league_join_recognized

conditions.query: The party formally joins the League of Adventurers, is accepted as members, receives League credentials, or is officially registered by a League representative.

league_membership_bootstrap_tower.name: league_membership_bootstrap_tower

league_hidden_state.name: league_hidden_state

league_contract_credit_awarded.name: league_contract_credit_awarded

conditions.query: A League registrar, ranking officer, or authorized chapterhouse representative formally recognizes completion of a specific League contract and awards the party credit toward League rank advancement.

league_status_request.name: league_status_request

conditions.query: The player asks about their League rank, League standing, contract credits, credentials, advancement requirements, or what they need to do to earn the next League rank.

league_promotion_request.name: league_promotion_request

conditions.query: The player requests League promotion, asks to advance rank, petitions a League registrar for advancement, presents completed contracts for promotion, or asks a League officer to raise their rank.

league_capture_copper_to_bronze.name: league_capture_copper_to_bronze

conditions.query: An authorized League registrar, ranking officer, or chapterhouse representative formally promotes the party from Copper rank to Bronze rank.

league_capture_bronze_to_silver.name: league_capture_bronze_to_silver

conditions.query: An authorized League registrar, ranking officer, or chapterhouse representative formally promotes the party from Bronze rank to Silver rank.

league_capture_silver_to_gold.name: league_capture_silver_to_gold

conditions.query: An authorized senior League officer formally promotes the party from Silver rank to Gold rank.

league_rank_contract_scope.name: league_rank_contract_scope

effects.instruction:
## Player Character Journey Phase: Starting Out

The party is in the beginning phase of their story, just getting started on their path in life. Do not introduce any themes that would move the story beyond local scope. Magic-using player-characters are still novices — their spells are effortful and small in scale. Major magical effects are beyond them. They are unproven. Any hostile characters encountered should be manageable in strength and number.

The party is becoming more experienced. The scope of the tale's events may extend to larger regional events, where appropriate to the characters and their story. Magic-using player characters are competent, and major effects are possible. Hostile forces encountered can include organized enemies, skilled opponents, and dangerous creatures, where appropriate to the tale.

The party has become quite experienced. Allow, but do not force, the tale to become epic in scope, spanning multiple regions or the entire world. Magic-using player-characters have grown formidable — major effects are available and impressive. Hostile encounters can include elite combatants, powerful monsters, and supernatural foes, but do not force such entities into the story unless appropriate to events.

The party has gained an elite level of experience.  Magic-using player-characters are extraordinary. Allow, but do not force, the scope of the tale to span the world level and even beyond. Permit, without forcing, player characters to be regarded as among the most powerful people alive. Hostile encounters can include legendary foes and otherworldly threats, but do not shoehorn such entities into the story unless they are appropriate to the characters and tale.

A nimble pickpocket deliberately bumps into one of the party members in the crowded bazaar. They expertly lift a small item or coin purse from the character and quickly disappear into the throng of shoppers before anyone can react. Describe the sleight of hand and the character's realization that they've been robbed.

conditions.query: A party member goes to sleep, falls asleep, or rests for the night in the Bazaar

effects.instruction: The sleeping character experiences vivid, unsettling dreams about the desert - visions of transformation, ancient mysteries, and something powerful calling to them from the sands. When they wake, they find themselves in a different, more public part of the Bazaar than where they fell asleep. Their nose has bled during the dream, dried blood on their face. The dream felt more real than dreams should.

conditions.query: A vampire bites a party member, transmitting the vampiric curse through the wound

effects.instruction: If it is true that a player has been bitten by a vampire, then narrate the process of the bitten player (and any other players in the party, who are subject to the curse as well through a process that you are free to invent) becoming vampires. The vampiric infection spreads through the bitten character's blood with unnatural speed. Describe the mental and physical sensation of becoming a vampire. Clearly state that the player has become afflicted by the curse of vampirism.

conditions.query: The party is exposed to direct sunlight during daytime

effects.instruction: The vampirism-afflicted character suffers terribly in direct sunlight. Their skin reddens and burns, strength drains from their limbs, and prolonged exposure threatens worse consequences. Describe the physical toll and tactical disadvantage this creates.

conditions.query: A character afflicted with vampirism is cured of the curse through ritual, divine intervention, magical cleansing, or other compelling means

effects.instruction: The vampiric curse breaks. Describe the moment of release as the affliction lifts - the unnatural hunger recedes, the sensitivity to sunlight fades, the predatory instincts that had begun to take root dissolve. The character feels fundamentally changed by having carried the curse, but they are mortal again.

conditions.query: A lycanthrope or werewolf bites or claws a party member, transmitting the lycanthropic curse through the wound

effects.instruction: If a player has been wounded by a lycanthrope, narrate the curse taking root. The wound burns with unnatural heat as it closes, fever sets in, and the afflicted character experiences the first stirrings of the beast-self - heightened senses, aggressive impulses, an awareness of the moon's pull. Clearly state that the character has become afflicted with the curse of lycanthropy. The curse spreads to all party members through whatever mechanism you deem appropriate.

conditions.query: A character afflicted with lycanthropy is cured of the curse through the death of the lycanthrope who infected them, powerful ritual magic, divine intervention, or other compelling means

effects.instruction: The curse of lycanthropy breaks its hold. The beast-self that has haunted the character's thoughts falls silent, the moon's pull ceases, and the body settles back into its natural state permanently. Describe the profound relief but also the strange emptiness - the heightened senses fade, the predatory strength ebbs away. The character is fully mortal again, though marked by having carried the curse.

Antagonistic forces move through the realm. Surface signs of their activity in ways that fit the current context. In social settings, rumors of attacks on remote settlements, refugees, mentions of growing tensions, takes of desperate people taking dark bargains. In wilderness, evidence of recent conflict, corrupted or aggressive creatures, signs of rituals performed, abandoned camps of cultists or mercenaries, travelers who warn of dangers. In civilized areas, political tensions escalating, guards suspicious of outsiders, merchants complaining about disrupted trade, signs of recent violence or theft. If antagonistic factions have been mentioned recently in the story, draw from those.

conditions.query: The immediate danger from the fire cultists at the Crossroads Inn has been resolved - they have been defeated, driven off, captured, evaded, or the situation has otherwise concluded.

effects.instruction: Vera takes the party aside when they have a moment to breathe. She explains she hasn't been entirely honest with them. She's been tracking a cult called the Church of the Pyre for weeks. She recently discovered they have an altar hidden in Ardan's Watch where they sacrifice prisoners to their fire god, Ignath. The altar is what gives the cultists their power in this region. She asks the party to help her find and destroy it before more innocent people die. She believes there may still be prisoners being held there, and that the authorities in the city can't be trusted.

## Contract Guidance
